hibernate-mapping.sql-query: WITH PLAN_YEAR AS ( SELECT * FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR WHERE ID = :realm_year_id ), LATEST_EFFDT AS ( SELECT PORTFOLIO_ID, MAX(EFFDT) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT WHERE EFFDT <= (SELECT PLAN_YEAR_START FROM PLAN_YEAR) GROUP BY PORTFOLIO_ID ), HQ_EXCLUSION AS ( SELECT 1 FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 JOIN PLAN_YEAR RPY ON T2.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER WHERE RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN (' ', :pickChooseFlag) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :state ), PORTFOLIOS AS ( SELECT XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID, PEF.DESCR, XRP.PLAN_TYPE, XRP.RULE, XRP.PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID, XRP.PRIMARY_PORTFOLIO FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP JOIN XBSS_PORTFOLIO XP ON XP.ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID JOIN PLAN_YEAR RPY ON XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER JOIN LATEST_EFFDT LE ON LE.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.ID JOIN XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF ON PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.ID AND PEF.EFFDT = LE.EFFDT LEFT JOIN XBSS_PORTFOLIO_AVAILABILITY XPA ON XPA.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.ID WHERE RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN (' ', :pickChooseFlag) AND ( (XRP.RESTRICTION IS NULL) OR (XRP.RESTRICTION = 'Z' AND XPA.POSTAL_CD = :zip_code AND XPA.STATE = :state AND :effdt BETWEEN XPA.EFFDT AND XPA.ENDDT) OR (XRP.RESTRICTION = :exclMedPlan) ) AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :state OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM HQ_EXCLUSION) ) ) ) SELECT * FROM PORTFOLIOS WHERE PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID IS NULL OR PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID IN (SELECT PORTFOLIO_ID FROM PORTFOLIOS)

SELECT GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, GP.ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE GP.COMPANY_ID = :companyId MINUS SELECT GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, GP.ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP , XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND SGP.STATUS = 'A' AND GP.ID = SGP.GROUP_ID

WITH PORTFOLIO_RULES AS ( SELECT PRL.* FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO PRL WHERE RPY.ID = :realm_year_id AND PRL.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN PRL.EFFDT AND PRL.ENDDT ) SELECT DISTINCT XBRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID , PEF.DESCR , CASE XSGP.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '1D' THEN '11' WHEN '1V' THEN '14' ELSE XSGP.PLAN_TYPE END AS PLAN_TYPE , XRP.RULE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP , XBSS_PORTFOLIO XP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP XSG , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XBRPP LEFT OUTER JOIN PORTFOLIO_RULES XRP ON XRP.PLAN_TYPE = ( CASE XBRPP.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '1D' THEN '11' WHEN '1V' THEN '14' ELSE XBRPP.PLAN_TYPE END ) AND XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID = XBRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :region OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM PORTFOLIO_RULES T2 WHERE T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :region ) ) ) WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategy_id AND RPY.ID = :realm_year_id AND XSG.STRATEGY_ID = XSGP.STRATEGY_ID AND XSG.STATUS = 'A' AND XSGP.GROUP_ID = XSG.GROUP_ID AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') AND XBRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID AND XBRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XP.ID = XBRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START ) UNION SELECT XRP1.PORTFOLIO_ID , PEF.DESCR , CASE XRP1.PLAN_TYPE WHEN '1D' THEN '11' WHEN '1V' THEN '14' ELSE XRP1.PLAN_TYPE END , XRP1.RULE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , PORTFOLIO_RULES XRP1 , XBSS_PORTFOLIO XP1 , XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE RPY.ID = :realm_year_id AND XRP1.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') AND XRP1.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND XRP1.RULE = 'Mandatory:T' AND XP1.ID = XRP1.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP1.ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START ) AND ( XRP1.HQ_REGION = :region OR ( XRP1.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM PORTFOLIO_RULES T3 WHERE T3.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T3.HQ_REGION = :region ) ) ) ORDER BY PLAN_TYPE

SELECT xas.DESCR, xasp.BENEFIT_PLAN, xas.ID, case when xrpp.plan_type in ( '1D','11') then 'dental' when xrpp.plan_type in ('1V', '14') then 'vision' when xrpp.plan_type in ('10') then 'medical' else 'additionalBenefit' end as plan_type FROM xbss_autoselect xas, XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN xasp, xbss_realm_plyr_plan xrpp WHERE xas.ID = xasp.AUTOSELECT_ID AND xasp.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND xrpp.REALM_YEAR_ID = xasp.REALM_YEAR_ID AND xrpp.BENEFIT_PLAN = xasp.BENEFIT_PLAN
SELECT count(*) FROM xbss_strategy s JOIN xbss_company c ON s.company_id = c.id AND s.submitted = 1 AND c.code = :companyCode AND c.realm_year_id = :prevRealmYrId

select C.code, R.id, Y.id from XBSS_REALM R, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR Y, XBIS_COMPANY C where C.code = :company and Y.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR Y1 WHERE Y1.realm_id = Y.realm_id) and R.id = Y.realm_id and R.id = :realmID

SELECT CV.COVRG_ID , CV.DESCR FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_REALM_CVG_CODES RCV , XBSS_CVG_CODES CV WHERE RPY.ID = :planYearId AND RCV.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RCV.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RCV.EFFDT AND RCV.ENDDT AND CV.COVRG_CD = RCV.COVRG_CD

SELECT RCV.PLAN_TYPE , CV.COVRG_ID , CV.DESCR FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_REALM_CVG_CODES RCV , XBSS_CVG_CODES CV WHERE RPY.ID = :planYearId AND RCV.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RCV.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :planTypes ) AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RCV.EFFDT AND RCV.ENDDT AND CV.COVRG_CD = RCV.COVRG_CD ORDER BY RCV.PLAN_TYPE, CV.SORT_ORDER

SELECT WP.WAITING_PERIOD , WPT.DESCR FROM XBSS_REALM_WAIT_PERIOD WP , XBSS_WAIT_PERIOD_TYPE WPT , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :planYearId AND WP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND WPT.WAITING_PERIOD = WP.WAITING_PERIOD AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN WP.EFFDT AND WP.ENDDT
SELECT WAITING_PERIOD, DESCR FROM XBSS_WAIT_PERIOD_TYPE

SELECT rt.pkg_type, rt.default_template FROM xbss_rl_region_template rt, xbss_realm_template t WHERE rt.TEMPLATE_ID = t.template_id AND t.realm_year_id = :realmYearId AND rt.ind_type = :industryType AND (rt.region = :state OR ( rt.region = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM xbss_rl_region_template t2, xbss_realm_template rt2 WHERE rt2.template_id = t2.template_id AND t2.ind_type = :industryType AND rt2.realm_year_id = :realmYearId AND t2.region = :state )))

SELECT DISTINCT XRRT.PKG_TYPE , CASE WHEN XTP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','1D') THEN '11' WHEN XTP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14','1V') THEN '14' ELSE XTP.PLAN_TYPE END AS PLAN_TYPE , XTP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_PORTFOLIO_PLAN XTP , XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE XRRT , XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE XRT WHERE XRRT.IND_TYPE = :INDUSTRYTYPE AND XTP.TEMPLATE_ID = XRRT.TEMPLATE_ID AND XRT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRT.TEMPLATE_ID = XTP.TEMPLATE_ID AND ( XRRT.REGION = :STATE OR ( XRRT.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE RT , XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE T WHERE T.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = T.TEMPLATE_ID AND RT.IND_TYPE = :INDUSTRYTYPE AND RT.REGION = :STATE ) ) ) UNION SELECT 'CON' AS PKG_TYPE , CASE WHEN XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','1D') THEN '11' WHEN XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14','1V') THEN '14' ELSE XRP.PLAN_TYPE END AS PLAN_TYPE , XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP WHERE RPY.ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE in ('10', '11','14','1D','1V') AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND XRP.RULE = 'Mandatory:T' AND XRP.RESTRICTION IS NULL AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :STATE OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :STATE ) ) ) UNION SELECT 'INT' AS PKG_TYPE , CASE WHEN XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','1D') THEN '11' WHEN XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14','1V') THEN '14' ELSE XRP.PLAN_TYPE END AS PLAN_TYPE , XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP WHERE RPY.ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE in ('10', '11','14','1D','1V') AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND XRP.RULE = 'Mandatory:T' AND XRP.RESTRICTION IS NULL AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :STATE OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :STATE ) ) ) UNION SELECT 'PRM' AS PKG_TYPE , CASE WHEN XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','1D') THEN '11' WHEN XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14','1V') THEN '14' ELSE XRP.PLAN_TYPE END AS PLAN_TYPE , XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP WHERE RPY.ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE in ('10', '11','14','1D','1V') AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND XRP.RULE = 'Mandatory:T' AND XRP.RESTRICTION IS NULL AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :STATE OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :STATE ) ) )

SELECT rt.pkg_type, tpp.plan_type, tpp.benefit_plan FROM xbss_rl_region_template rt, xbss_realm_template t, xbss_template_portfolio_plan tpp WHERE rt.template_id = t.template_id AND tpp.template_id = t.template_id AND tpp.plan_type NOT IN ('10','11','14','1V','1D') AND t.realm_year_id = :realmYearId AND rt.ind_type = :industryType AND (rt.region = :state OR ( rt.region = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM xbss_rl_region_template t2, xbss_realm_template rt2 WHERE rt2.template_id = t2.template_id AND rt2.realm_year_id = :realmYearId AND t2.ind_type = :industryType AND t2.region = :state )))

SELECT TF.ID, CASE :situs WHEN 'FL' THEN TF.BENEFIT_PLAN ELSE TF.TX_SITUS_BENEFIT_PLAN END AS BENEFIT_PLAN, TF.PLAN_TYPE, RGT3.PKG_TYPE, RGT3.REGION AS STATE, TF.FUNDING_TYPE, XTFD.CONTRIBUTION, XTFD.COVERAGE_ID FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_FUNDING TF, XBSS_TEMPLATE_FUNDING_REL TFR, XBSS_TEMPLATE TEMP, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE RGT3, XBSS_TEMPLATE_FUNDING_DETAIL XTFD WHERE TFR.TEMPLATE_ID IN ( SELECT T.ID FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE T, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE RGT, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT1 WHERE T.ID = RGT.TEMPLATE_ID AND RGT.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND RT1.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RGT.TEMPLATE_ID = RT1.TEMPLATE_ID AND RGT.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND ( RGT.REGION = :state OR ( RGT.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE T2, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE RGT2, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT2 WHERE T2.ID = RGT2.TEMPLATE_ID AND RGT2.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND RT2.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RGT2.TEMPLATE_ID = RT2.TEMPLATE_ID AND RGT2.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND RGT2.REGION = :state ) ) ) ) AND TEMP.ID = RGT3.TEMPLATE_ID AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = TFR.TEMPLATE_ID AND TF.ID = TFR.FUNDING_ID AND TEMP.ID = TFR.TEMPLATE_ID AND XTFD.TEMPLATE_FUNDING_ID = TF.ID

SELECT TPP.PORTFOLIO_ID, TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, TPP.PLAN_TYPE, REGION.PKG_TYPE FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_PORTFOLIO_PLAN TPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS RRP WHERE TPP.TEMPLATE_ID = REGION.TEMPLATE_ID AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RT.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RPP.ID = RRP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID AND TPP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND ( RRP.REGION IN (:state) OR RRP.REGION IS NULL ) AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = TPP.TEMPLATE_ID AND ( RPP.SITUS = :situs OR RPP.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGION.REGION = :state OR ( REGION.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE T2, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION WHERE REGION.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND REGION.REGION = :state ) ) ) UNION SELECT TPP.PORTFOLIO_ID, TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, TPP.PLAN_TYPE, REGION.PKG_TYPE FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_PORTFOLIO_PLAN TPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE TPP.TEMPLATE_ID = REGION.TEMPLATE_ID AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RT.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = TPP.TEMPLATE_ID AND ( RPP.SITUS = :situs OR RPP.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGION.REGION = :state OR ( REGION.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE T2, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION WHERE REGION.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND REGION.REGION = :state ) ) ) UNION SELECT XTOP.PORTFOLIO_ID, XTOP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XTOP.PLAN_TYPE, XTOP.PKG_TYPE FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_OVERRIDE_PLANS XTOP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE XTOP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND XTOP.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND XTOP.REGION = :state AND XTOP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND XTOP.BENEFIT_PLAN = RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND ( RPP.SITUS = :situs OR RPP.SITUS IS NULL )

SELECT TPP.PORTFOLIO_ID, TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, TPP.PLAN_TYPE, REGION.PKG_TYPE FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_PORTFOLIO_PLAN TPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS RRP WHERE TPP.TEMPLATE_ID = REGION.TEMPLATE_ID AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RT.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RPP.ID = RRP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID AND TPP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND ( RRP.REGION IN (:state) OR RRP.REGION IS NULL ) AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = TPP.TEMPLATE_ID AND ( RPP.SITUS = :situs OR RPP.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGION.REGION = :state OR ( REGION.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE T2, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION WHERE REGION.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND REGION.REGION = :state ) ) ) UNION SELECT TPP.PORTFOLIO_ID, TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, TPP.PLAN_TYPE, REGION.PKG_TYPE FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_PORTFOLIO_PLAN TPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE TPP.TEMPLATE_ID = REGION.TEMPLATE_ID AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = TPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RT.REALM_YEAR_ID AND TPP.PLAN_TYPE <> '10' AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = TPP.TEMPLATE_ID AND ( RPP.SITUS = :situs OR RPP.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGION.REGION = :state OR ( REGION.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE T2, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE RT, XBSS_RL_REGION_TEMPLATE REGION WHERE REGION.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.TEMPLATE_ID = T2.ID AND RT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND REGION.IND_TYPE = :ind_type AND REGION.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND REGION.REGION = :state ) ) ) UNION SELECT XTOP.PORTFOLIO_ID, XTOP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XTOP.PLAN_TYPE, XTOP.PKG_TYPE FROM XBSS_TEMPLATE_OVERRIDE_PLANS XTOP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE XTOP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId AND XTOP.PKG_TYPE IN (:pkg_type_list) AND XTOP.REGION = :state AND XTOP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND XTOP.BENEFIT_PLAN = RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND ( RPP.SITUS = :situs OR RPP.SITUS IS NULL )

select con.id, con.plan_selection_id, con.coverage_level, con.er_contrib_pct, con.headcount, plan.benefit_plan, cvgcodes.covrg_id ,con.bn_emplr_rate,con.bn_empl_rate, con.override_type, NVL(con.hsa_headcount, 0) from XBSS_CONTRIBUTION con, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT plan, XBSS_CVG_CODES cvgcodes where con.plan_selection_id in :ids and con.plan_selection_id = plan.id and con.coverage_level = cvgcodes.covrg_cd
select id, strategy_id, group_id, plan_type, benefit_plan from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id = :strategyId and group_id = :groupId and benefit_plan = :benefitPlan
delete from XBSS_CONTRIBUTION where PLAN_SELECTION_ID in (select id from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id = :strategyId and group_id = :groupId)
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id = :strategyId and group_id = :groupId
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL where strategy_id = :strategyId and group_id = :groupId
delete from XBSS_CONTRIBUTION where PLAN_SELECTION_ID in (select id from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds) )
delete from XBSS_CONTRIBUTION where PLAN_SELECTION_ID in (select id from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds) and PLAN_TYPE = :planType)
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds)
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds) and PLAN_TYPE = :planType
delete from xbss_strategy_funding_detail where strategy_funding_id in (select id from xbss_strategy_funding_model where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds))
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_FLTMAX where strategy_funding_id in (select id from xbss_strategy_funding_model where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds))
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL where strategy_id in (:strategyIds)
delete From Xbss_Strategy Where Id in (:strategyIds)
delete From xbss_employee Where realm_year_id = :realmYearId and company=:company
delete From xbss_group Where company_id = :companyId
delete From xbss_group Where id in (:groupIds)
delete xbss_group_cov_headcount where group_id in (select id from xbss_group where company_id =:companyId)
delete xbss_group_cov_headcount where group_id in (:groupIds)
delete xbss_group_rate where group_id in (select id from xbss_group where company_id =:companyId)
delete xbss_group_rate where group_id in (:groupIds)
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP where STRATEGY_ID in (:strategyIds)
DELETE FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_STRATEGY_GROUP WHERE STRATEGY_GROUP_ID IN (SELECT SG.id FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG, XBSS_STRATEGY S WHERE S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND S.ID IN (:strategyIds) )
DELETE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_COV_HC WHERE STRATEGY_GROUP_ID IN (SELECT SG.id FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG, XBSS_STRATEGY S WHERE S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND S.ID IN (:strategyIds) )
select EMPLOYER_PAID_PLAN_TYPE, EMPLOYER_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN, EMPLOYEE_PAID_PLAN_TYPE, EMPLOYEE_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN from XBSS_ER_EE_PLANS_MAPPING where realm_year_id = :realmYearId
select EMPLOYER_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN, EMPLOYEE_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN from XBSS_ER_EE_PLANS_MAPPING where realm_year_id = :realmYearId
select count(*) from XBSS_ER_EE_PLANS_MAPPING where REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId
SELECT PLAN_TYPE , BENEFIT_PLAN , ANNUAL_CAP , EST_RATE FROM XBSS_REALM_YEAR_ESTIMATE WHERE REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLAN_TYPE = 'A3'

SELECT RT.PLAN_TYPE , A.XLATLONGNAME , A.XLATSHORTNAME FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_TYPE RT , PSXLATITEM@HRDB_SEEKER A , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :planYearId AND RT.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RT.EFFDT AND RT.ENDDT AND A.FIELDNAME = 'PLAN_TYPE' AND A.FIELDVALUE = RT.PLAN_TYPE AND A.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PSXLATITEM@HRDB_SEEKER A_ED WHERE A.FIELDNAME = A_ED.FIELDNAME AND A.FIELDVALUE = A_ED.FIELDVALUE AND A_ED.EFFDT <= sysdate ) AND A.EFF_STATUS = 'A'
update XBSS_STRATEGY set submitted = 0, submitdate = null where id in (select id from XBSS_STRATEGY where SUBMITTED = 1 and company_id = :companyId)
select covrg_cd, covrg_id from XBSS_CVG_CODES

select s.id, s.company_id, s.name, s.comments, s.currenttotalcost, s.estimatedtotalcost, s.percentchange, s.submitdate, s.submitted, s.totalbudget, s.type,c.realm_year_id, s.budget_factor from xbss_strategy s, xbss_company c where s.submitted = 1 and c.id = s.company_id and c.code = :companyCode and c.realm_year_id = :realmPlanYearId

SELECT sgp.group_id, sgp.benefit_plan, con.coverage_level, con.headcount, sgp.plan_type, gr.benefit_program FROM xbss_strategy s, xbss_company c, xbss_strategy_group_planselect sgp, xbss_contribution con, xbss_group gr WHERE c.id = s.company_id AND c.code = :companyCode AND c.realm_year_id = :realmPlanYearId AND sgp.strategy_id = s.id AND con.plan_selection_id = sgp.id AND gr.id = sgp.group_id

select s.id, s.company_id, s.name, s.comments, s.estimatedtotalcost as currenttotalcost, s.estimatedtotalcost, s.percentchange, s.submitdate, s.submitted, s.totalbudget, s.type,c.realm_year_id from xbss_strategy s, xbss_company c where s.submitted = 1 and c.id = s.company_id and c.code = :companyCode and c.realm_year_id in (select realm_year_id from xbss_company where code = :companyCode and realm_year_id <> :realmPlanYearId)

select s.id, s.company_id, s.name, s.comments, s.currenttotalcost, s.estimatedtotalcost, s.percentchange, s.submitdate, s.submitted, s.totalbudget, s.type,c.realm_year_id from xbss_strategy s, xbss_company c where c.id = s.company_id and c.code = :companyCode and c.realm_year_id = :realmPlanYearId

select s.id, s.company_id, s.benefit_program, s.descr, s.default_group, s.group_type, s.headcount, s.waiting_period, s.elig_rules_id, s.rate_tbl_id, c.realm_year_id, s.elig_config1 from xbss_group s, xbss_company c where c.id = s.company_id and c.code = :companyCode and c.realm_year_id = :realmPlanYearId and status=:status
SELECT RATE_ID_TYPE, RATE_TBL_ID FROM XBSS_GROUP_RATE WHERE GROUP_ID = :id
SELECT RATE_TBL_ID FROM XBSS_GROUP_RATE WHERE GROUP_ID = :groupID AND RATE_ID_TYPE = :rateIdType
INSERT INTO XBSS_GROUP_RATE ( GROUP_ID, RATE_TBL_ID, RATE_ID_TYPE ) VALUES ( :groupId, :rateTblId, :rateIdType )

SELECT FM.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN , FM.PLAN_TYPE , FM.NAME , FM.CUSTOMIZED , FMD.CONTRIBUTION , FMD.COVERAGE_ID , FM.FUNDING_TYPE , FM.ID , (SELECT PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN WHERE BENEFIT_PLAN = FM.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND REALM_YEAR_ID =:PLANYEAR_ID ) AS PORTFOLIO , FMX.CONTRIBUTION AS FLTMAX_CONTRIBUTION , FMX.COVERAGE_ID AS FLTMAX_COVERAGE_ID, FM.WAIVER_ALLOWANCE, FM.BSUPP_EXCESS_OPTION FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL FM JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_DETAIL FMD ON FM.ID = FMD.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID LEFT JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_FLTMAX FMX ON FM.ID = FMX.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID WHERE FM.GROUP_ID = :GROUP_ID AND FM.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID

WITH ALL_RULES AS ( SELECT XRLPTR.* FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_TYPE_RULES XRLPTR , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRLPTR.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRLPTR.EFFDT AND XRLPTR.ENDDT ) SELECT RL.PLAN_TYPE , RL.MANDATORY FROM ALL_RULES RL WHERE ( RL.REGION IN ( :regions ) OR ( RL.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM ALL_RULES R1 WHERE R1.REGION IN ( :regions ) ) ) )

SELECT xrpp.plan_type, xrpp.benefit_plan FROM xbss_realm_plyr_plan xrpp JOIN xbss_rl_region_plans xrrp ON xrrp.realm_plyr_plan_id = xrpp.id JOIN Xbss_Realm_Voluntary_Plans plan_vw ON plan_vw.benefit_plan = xrpp.benefit_plan WHERE xrpp.realm_year_id =:realmPlanYearId AND xrpp.Plan_Type in ('30', '31') AND xrrp.region =:region UNION SELECT plans.plan_type, plans.benefit_plan FROM xbss_realm_plyr_plan plans LEFT JOIN xbss_rl_region_plans regions ON regions.realm_plyr_plan_id = plans.id JOIN Xbss_Realm_Voluntary_Plans plan_vw ON plan_vw.Benefit_Plan = plans.benefit_plan WHERE plans.realm_year_id =:realmPlanYearId AND plans.Plan_Type in ('30', '31') AND (regions.region =:region OR regions.region IS NULL) AND plans.benefit_plan NOT IN (SELECT plans_3.benefit_plan FROM xbss_realm_plyr_plan plans_3 LEFT JOIN xbss_rl_region_plans regions_3 ON regions_3.realm_plyr_plan_id = plans_3.id WHERE plans_3.realm_year_id =:realmPlanYearId AND plans_3.Plan_Type in ('30', '31') AND regions_3.region =:region )
SELECT RT.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_TYPE RT , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND RT.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RT.EFFDT AND RT.ENDDT

SELECT CP.OE_QUARTER, CP.CLONE_BENPGM, CP.CLONE_K1_BENPGM, CP.CLONE_COMPANY, CP.EFFDT, CP.ENDDT FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT

SELECT CP.CLONE_BENPGM, RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START FROM XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM CP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :planYearId AND CP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN CP.EFFDT AND CP.ENDDT

select benefit_plan, plan_Type from xbss_autoselect_plan where autoselect_id in (select autoselect_id from xbss_autoselect_plan where benefit_plan in (:planList) and realm_year_id = :realmYearId) and plan_type in ('10','11', '14', '1D', '1V', '30', '31') and benefit_plan NOT in (:planList)

select BP.benefit_plan, BP.vendor_id from xbss_benef_plan_mv BP where BP.benefit_plan in ( :list ) AND BP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = BP.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST( GREATEST( RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC( sysdate ) ), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId ) )
select NEWPLANID from XBSS_REALM_PLAN_MAPPING where REALM_YEAR_ID=:realmPlanYearId

select PORTFOLIO_ID , DESCR from XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT XPE1 where XPE1.EFFDT = ( select MAX(EFFDT) from XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT XPE2 where XPE2.PORTFOLIO_ID = XPE1.PORTFOLIO_ID and XPE2.EFFDT <= :effectiveDate ) ORDER BY PORTFOLIO_ID

SELECT RT.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_TYPE RT , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RT.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RT.EFFDT AND RT.ENDDT AND RT.PLAN_TYPE = 'A3'

SELECT RT.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_TYPE RT , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND RT.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RT.EFFDT AND RT.ENDDT AND RT.BSS_PLAN_TYPE = '23'

SELECT XRFT.FUNDING_TYPE , XFT.DESCR , XRFT.DEFAULT_FUNDING FROM XBSS_REALM_FUNDING_TYPE XRFT , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_FUNDING_TYPE XFT WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRFT.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRFT.EFFDT AND XRFT.ENDDT AND XRFT.FUNDING_TYPE = XFT.FUNDING_TYPE

SELECT STATE FROM CSS_COMP_LOCT_TBL WHERE OLP_ID IN ( SELECT OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL WHERE COMPANY = :company ) UNION SELECT STATE FROM OLP_COMPANY_TBL WHERE OLP_ID IN ( SELECT OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL WHERE COMPANY = :company ) UNION SELECT STATE FROM OLP_LOCATION_TBL WHERE OLP_ID IN ( SELECT OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL WHERE COMPANY = :company ) UNION SELECT STATE FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER CO WHERE CO.COMPANY = :company AND CO.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_COMPANY_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER C1 WHERE C1.COMPANY = CO.COMPANY ) UNION SELECT STATE FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER LO WHERE LO.PF_CLIENT IN ( SELECT PF_CLIENT FROM PS_T2_CLIENTOPTION@HRDB_SEEKER WHERE COMPANY = :company ) AND LO.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L1 WHERE L1.SETID = LO.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = LO.LOCATION ) AND LO.EFF_STATUS = 'A'

WITH FUNDING_PLANS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT PG.PLAN_TYPE, PG.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM@HRDB_SEEKER UNPIVOT( BENEFIT_PLAN FOR PLAN_TYPE IN ( T2_LIMIT_PLAN_10 AS '10' ) ) PG WHERE PG.COMPANY = :company AND TRIM(PG.BENEFIT_PLAN) IS NOT NULL AND PG.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(P1.EFFDT) FROM PS_T2_PRCL_BN_PGM@HRDB_SEEKER P1 WHERE P1.T2_PEO_ID = PG.T2_PEO_ID AND P1.COMPANY = PG.COMPANY AND P1.PF_CLIENT = PG.PF_CLIENT AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate) ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT REGIONS.REGION FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS WHERE PLANS.ID = REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID AND PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN = FP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND REGIONS.REGION IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN REGIONS.REGION IN (:regions) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, REGIONS.REGION) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) REGION FROM FUNDING_PLANS FP) WHERE REGION IS NOT NULL
SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN, REGION FROM XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN where REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = ID ORDER BY BENEFIT_PLAN

select plyr.benefit_plan, reg.region from XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN plyr, xbss_rl_region_plans reg where plyr.id = reg.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID and plyr.id in ( select id from xbss_realm_plyr_plan where benefit_plan in (select benefit_plan from xbss_autoselect_plan where autoselect_id in (select autoselect_id from xbss_autoselect_plan where benefit_plan in (:planList) and realm_year_id = :realmYearId) and plan_type in ('10') and benefit_plan NOT in (:planList))) ORDER BY (reg.region)
SELECT UNIQUE XR.BEN_EXCHNG, XRPY.OE_QUARTER FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR XRPY, XBSS_REALM XR WHERE XRPY.REALM_ID = XR.ID
SELECT PORTFOLIO_ID, BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_DEFAULT_PLANS WHERE REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId

select distinct tpp.benefit_plan, tpp.plan_type from xbss_rl_region_template rrt, XBSS_TEMPLATE_PORTFOLIO_PLAN tpp, XBSS_REALM_TEMPLATE rt where rrt.PKG_TYPE=:pkgType and tpp.plan_type in ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') and rt.realm_year_id = :realmYearId and rt.template_id = rrt.template_id and tpp.template_id = rt.id and (rrt.Region = :region OR ( rrt.region ='OT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM xbss_template t2, xbss_rl_region_template region WHERE region.template_id = t2.ID AND region.ind_type = :indType AND region.pkg_type IN (:pkgType) AND region.region = :region )))

SELECT OP.ID AS OPT_ID , OP.DESCR AS OPT_DESCR , PL.BENEFIT_PLAN , PL.PLAN_TYPE , PL.DESCR AS PLAN_DESCR , PL.SHORT_DESCR AS PLAN_SHORT_DESCR , OP.REGION , PL.PRIMARY_PLAN AS IS_PRIM_PLN , PL.EMPLOYEE_PAID AS IS_EMP_PAID , OP.STANDALONE_OPT AS IS_STANDALONE , PL.TAX_FREE AS TAX_FREE , OP.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE , OP.DISPLAY_SEQ FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION OP , XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS PL WHERE OP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND OP.ID = PL.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND ( OP.REGION = :region OR ( OP.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO , XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS XDOP WHERE XDO.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XDO.ID = XDOP.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND XDO.REGION = :region ) ) )
select PLAN_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, PRIMARY_PLAN from XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS a, XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION b where a.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID = b.ID and b.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId

SELECT XDOP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XDOP.PLAN_TYPE, XDOP.PRIMARY_PLAN AS IS_PRIM_PLN FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO, XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS XDOP WHERE XDO.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XDO.ID = XDOP.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND XDOP.EMPLOYEE_PAID = 0 AND (XDO.REGION = :region OR ( XDO.REGION ='OT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO1, XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS XDOP1 WHERE XDO.REALM_YEAR_ID=:realmPlanYearId AND XDO1.ID = XDOP1.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND XDO1.REGION = :region )))

SELECT XSFM.FUNDING_TYPE, XSFM.PLAN_TYPE, XSFM.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN, XSFD.COVERAGE_ID, XSFD.CONTRIBUTION, XG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, FMX.COVERAGE_ID AS FLTMAX_COVERAGE_ID, FMX.CONTRIBUTION AS FLTMAX_CONTRIBUTION, XSFM.WAIVER_ALLOWANCE, XSFM.BSUPP_EXCESS_OPTION FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL XSFM JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_DETAIL XSFD ON XSFM.ID = XSFD.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID LEFT JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_FLTMAX FMX ON XSFM.ID = FMX.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID, XBSS_GROUP XG, XBSS_STRATEGY XS, XBSS_COMPANY XC WHERE XSFM.id = XSFD.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID AND XG.id = XSFM.GROUP_ID AND XSFM.STRATEGY_ID = XS.ID AND XS.COMPANY_ID =XC.ID AND XC.REALM_YEAR_ID =:realmPlanYearId AND XC.CODE =:company AND XS.submitted =1

SELECT XSFM.FUNDING_TYPE, XSFM.PLAN_TYPE, XSFM.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN, XSFD.COVERAGE_ID, XSFD.CONTRIBUTION, XG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, FMX.COVERAGE_ID AS FLTMAX_COVERAGE_ID, FMX.CONTRIBUTION AS FLTMAX_CONTRIBUTION, XSFM.WAIVER_ALLOWANCE, XSFM.BSUPP_EXCESS_OPTION, XSFM.ID, XSFM.CUSTOMIZED, XSFM.NAME FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL XSFM JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_DETAIL XSFD ON XSFM.ID = XSFD.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID LEFT JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_FLTMAX FMX ON XSFM.ID = FMX.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID, XBSS_GROUP XG, XBSS_STRATEGY XS WHERE XSFM.ID = XSFD.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID AND XG.ID = XSFM.GROUP_ID AND XSFM.STRATEGY_ID = XS.ID AND XS.ID = :strategyId

SELECT P.FIRST_NAME, P.NAME FROM PERSON_NAMES P WHERE PERSONID = ( SELECT PERSONID FROM PERSON_KEYS WHERE PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 AND PERS_KEY = :userPersonId ) AND SYSDATE between EFFDT AND ENDDT AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT DISTINCT PA.URL FROM PERSON_EMPLYMNT PE, PERSON_ACCESSES PA WHERE PE.PERSONID =:personId AND PE.PERSONID = PA.PERSONID AND PA.ACCESS_TYPE = 'Work' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN PA.EFFDT AND PA.ENDDT

SELECT T2.URL AS HREMAIL FROM ORG_OPTIONS T1, PERSON_ACCESSES T2 WHERE T1.T2_HR_MANAGER= T2.PERSONID AND SYSDATE BETWEEN T1.EFFDT AND T1.ENDDT AND ORGID =:companyId AND T2.MEDIA ='Email' AND T2.ACCESS_TYPE='Work' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT

select c.id, c.PLAN_SELECTION_ID, c.COVERAGE_LEVEL, c.ER_CONTRIB_PCT, c.HEADCOUNT, c.BN_EMPL_RATE, c.BN_EMPLR_RATE,s.GROUP_ID, s.BENEFIT_PLAN, s.PLAN_TYPE, s.STRATEGY_ID from XBSS_CONTRIBUTION c, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT s where s.ID = c.PLAN_SELECTION_ID and s.GROUP_ID in( select id from xbss_group where company_id in ( select id from xbss_company where code =:companyCode)) and s.PLAN_TYPE in (:primaryPlanTypes) and s.STRATEGY_ID in (:strategyId)

select c.id, c.PLAN_SELECTION_ID, c.COVERAGE_LEVEL, c.ER_CONTRIB_PCT, c.HEADCOUNT, c.BN_EMPL_RATE, c.BN_EMPLR_RATE,s.GROUP_ID, s.BENEFIT_PLAN, s.PLAN_TYPE, s.STRATEGY_ID, g.benefit_program from XBSS_CONTRIBUTION c, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT s, XBSS_GROUP g where s.ID = c.PLAN_SELECTION_ID and s.GROUP_ID in( select id from xbss_group where company_id in ( select id from xbss_company where code =:companyCode)) and s.PLAN_TYPE in (:primaryPlanTypes) and s.STRATEGY_ID in (:strategyId) and s.GROUP_ID = g.id

select Id, Group_id, STRATEGY_ID, PLAN_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, HEADCOUNT from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT where GROUP_ID in ( select id from xbss_group where company_id in ( select id from xbss_company where code =:companyCode)) and STRATEGY_ID in (:strategyId) and PLAN_TYPE in (:additionalPlanTypes)

select s.GROUP_ID, s.id, s.BENEFIT_PLAN, s.PLAN_TYPE from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT s where s.GROUP_ID in ( select id from xbss_group where company_id in ( select id from xbss_company where code =:companyCode)) and s.PLAN_TYPE in (:primaryPlanTypes)
select benefit_plan, plan_type, portfolio_id, hdhp from XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN where REALM_YEAR_ID in (:planYears)
select COMPANY_ID, BAND_CODE_TYPE, BAND_CODE_VAL from XBSS_BAND_CODES where COMPANY_ID = :companyId
select COMPANY_ID, LOCATION from XBSS_COMPANY_LOCATION where COMPANY_ID = :companyId
INSERT INTO XBSS_BAND_CODES ( COMPANY_ID, BAND_CODE_TYPE, BAND_CODE_VAL) VALUES ( :companyId, :bandCodeType, :bandCodeValue)
delete from XBSS_BAND_CODES where COMPANY_ID = :companyId

SELECT DISTINCT XDOP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO, XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS XDOP WHERE XDO.REALM_YEAR_ID =:realmPlanYearId AND XDO.ID =XDOP.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND (XDO.REGION = :region OR ( XDO.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO2 WHERE XDO2.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XDO2.REGION = :region ))) UNION SELECT XRP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRP WHERE XRP.REALM_YEAR_ID=:realmPlanYearId AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23','A3')

SELECT RATE_TBL_ID FROM XBSS_GROUP WHERE RATE_TBL_ID = :rateTableId AND BENEFIT_PROGRAM != :benefitProgram UNION SELECT GR.RATE_TBL_ID FROM XBSS_GROUP GP , XBSS_GROUP_RATE GR WHERE GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM != :benefitProgram AND GR.RATE_TBL_ID = :rateTableId AND GR.GROUP_ID = GP.ID

WITH REALM_PLAN_MAPPING_DATA AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RPM.NEWPLANID = RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_NEW_PLAN, CASE WHEN :realmPlanYearId IN (51, 52) THEN 1 WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_MAPPING SUB_MAP WHERE SUB_MAP.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPM.REALM_YEAR_ID AND SUB_MAP.NEWPLANID = RPM.NEWPLANID) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_MULTI_MAPPED, RPM.OLDPLANID, RPM.NEWPLANID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_MAPPING RPM WHERE RPM.REALM_YEAR_ID = ( SELECT DISTINCT MAX(FUTURE_RPY.ID) FROM XBSS_REALM R, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR FUTURE_RPY, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE R.ID = RPY.REALM_ID AND RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND R.ID = FUTURE_RPY.REALM_ID AND FUTURE_RPY.ID > RPY.ID AND FUTURE_RPY.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER) ) SELECT XG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XC.COVERAGE_LEVEL, XC.OVERRIDE_TYPE, MD.IS_NEW_PLAN, MD.IS_MULTI_MAPPED, MD.NEWPLANID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP LEFT OUTER JOIN REALM_PLAN_MAPPING_DATA MD ON XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = MD.OLDPLANID, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION XC, XBSS_GROUP XG WHERE XSGP.ID = XC.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND XG.ID = XSGP.GROUP_ID AND XSGP.STRATEGY_ID IN ( SELECT XS.ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY XS, XBSS_COMPANY XC WHERE XS.COMPANY_ID =XC.ID AND XC.CODE = :companyCode AND XC.REALM_YEAR_ID=:realmPlanYearId AND XS.SUBMITTED=1)

SELECT DISTINCT XAP.BENEFIT_PLAN, NVL(XRRP.SUB_REGION, XRRP.REGION), XAP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN XAP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS XRRP WHERE AUTOSELECT_ID IN ( SELECT XAP1.AUTOSELECT_ID FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN XAP1 WHERE XAP1.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:selectedPlans) AND XAP1.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId ) AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XAP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRRP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = XRPP.ID AND XAP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10') AND XAP.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:selectedPlans) UNION SELECT DISTINCT XAP.BENEFIT_PLAN, NULL, XAP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN XAP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP WHERE AUTOSELECT_ID IN ( SELECT XAP1.AUTOSELECT_ID FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN XAP1 WHERE XAP1.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:selectedPlans) AND XAP1.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId ) AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XAP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XAP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','14','1D','1V') AND XAP.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:selectedPlans)

WITH LATEST_BENEF_PLAN_MV AS ( SELECT PLAN_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN, VENDOR_ID, DESCR, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PLAN_TYPE, BENEFIT_PLAN ORDER BY EFFDT DESC) AS RNUM FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV WHERE EFFDT <= :effDate ) SELECT XSGP.STRATEGY_ID, XSGP.GROUP_ID, XSGP.PLAN_TYPE, XSGP.ID, XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID, NULL AS cross_ref_plan_id, LBPMV.VENDOR_ID, LBPMV.DESCR, XSGP.HEADCOUNT, XSGP.PPO, XRPP.PLAN_CATEGORY, XRPP.HDHP FROM XBSS_COMPANY XC JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY XS ON XS.COMPANY_ID = XC.ID JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP ON XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = XS.ID JOIN XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP ON XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = XC.REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRPP.PLAN_TYPE = XSGP.PLAN_TYPE AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN LEFT JOIN LATEST_BENEF_PLAN_MV LBPMV ON LBPMV.PLAN_TYPE = XSGP.PLAN_TYPE AND LBPMV.BENEFIT_PLAN = XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND LBPMV.RNUM = 1 WHERE XC.CODE = :companyCode AND XC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId

SELECT XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, NVL( XRRP.SUB_REGION, XRRP.REGION) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS XRRP WHERE XRRP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = XRPP.ID AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:selectedPlans) AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID =:realmPlanYearId

SELECT XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, NVL( XRRP.SUB_REGION, XRRP.REGION) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS XRRP WHERE XRPP.ID = XRRP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID =:realmPlanYearId AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:benefitPlans)

SELECT XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, NVL( XRRP.SUB_REGION, XRRP.REGION) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS XRRP WHERE XRPP.ID = XRRP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID =:realmPlanYearId AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:benefitPlans) ORDER BY XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE where STRATEGY_ID in (:strategyIds)
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE where STRATEGY_ID=:strategyId and GROUP_ID=:groupId
delete from XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE where STRATEGY_ID in (:strategyIds) and PLAN_TYPE in ( :planTypes )
insert into XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE (STRATEGY_ID, GROUP_ID, PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE, ESTIMATE) values (:strategyId, :groupId, :planType, :planSubType, :estimate)

INSERT INTO XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE (STRATEGY_ID, GROUP_ID, PLAN_TYPE, ESTIMATE, EE_ESTIMATE) WITH GROUPS AS ( SELECT SG.STRATEGY_ID, SG.GROUP_ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG WHERE SG.STRATEGY_ID IN (:strategyIds) AND SG.STATUS = 'A' ), EE_DATA AS ( select PA.STRATEGY_ID, ESG.FUTURE_GROUP_ID GROUP_ID, PA.BENEFIT_TYPE, SUM(PA.EE_RATE) EE_RATE, SUM(PA.ER_RATE) ER_RATE from XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT PA , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESG where PA.STRATEGY_ID = ESG.STRATEGY_ID and PA.EMPLID = ESG.EMPLID and PA.STRATEGY_ID IN (:strategyIds) and PA.BENEFIT_TYPE in ( :planTypes ) group by PA.STRATEGY_ID, ESG.FUTURE_GROUP_ID, PA.BENEFIT_TYPE ) SELECT G.STRATEGY_ID, G.GROUP_ID, EE.BENEFIT_TYPE, NVL(EE.ER_RATE, 0), NVL(EE.EE_RATE, 0) FROM GROUPS G LEFT OUTER JOIN EE_DATA EE ON G.STRATEGY_ID = EE.STRATEGY_ID AND G.GROUP_ID = EE.GROUP_ID WHERE EE.BENEFIT_TYPE IS NOT NULL

WITH STRATEGY_DATA AS ( SELECT S.ID , S.NAME , C.REALM_YEAR_ID , S.SUBMITTED , S.TYPE , 0 IS_HISTORY FROM XBSS_COMPANY C , XBSS_STRATEGY S WHERE C.ID = :companyId AND S.COMPANY_ID = C.ID AND S.STATUS = 'A' UNION SELECT S.ID , S.NAME , HC.REALM_YEAR_ID , S.SUBMITTED , S.TYPE , 1 IS_HISTORY FROM XBSS_COMPANY HC , XBSS_COMPANY C , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PY , XBSS_STRATEGY S WHERE C.CODE = HC.CODE AND C.ID = :companyId AND PY.ID = C.REALM_YEAR_ID AND S.COMPANY_ID = HC.ID AND S.SUBMITTED = 1 AND S.STATUS = 'A' AND HC.REALM_YEAR_ID = ( SELECT MAX(ID) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR HPY WHERE HPY.ID < C.REALM_YEAR_ID AND PY.OE_QUARTER = HPY.OE_QUARTER AND HPY.PLAN_YEAR_END >= SYSDATE) ) SELECT SD.ID , SD.NAME , SD.SUBMITTED , SD.IS_HISTORY , CASE WHEN (SD.IS_HISTORY = 0 AND SD.SUBMITTED = 1 AND 0 < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STRATEGY_DATA SD1 WHERE SD1.IS_HISTORY = 1)) THEN 0 WHEN (SD.TYPE = 'selected' AND 0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STRATEGY_DATA SD1 WHERE SD1.SUBMITTED = 1)) THEN 1 WHEN (SD.TYPE = 'recommended' AND 0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STRATEGY_DATA SD1 WHERE SD1.SUBMITTED = 1)) THEN 1 ELSE SD.SUBMITTED END AS ACTIVE FROM STRATEGY_DATA SD ORDER BY 5 DESC, 1

SELECT XSG.COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, XSG.STRATEGY_ID AS STRATEGY_ID, XSG.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID, XSG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM, XSG.GROUP_DESCR AS GROUP_DESC, XWP.DESCR AS WP_DESC, XSFM.ID AS FUNDING_MODEL_ID, XSFM.PLAN_TYPE, XSFM.FUNDING_TYPE, XSFM.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN, XSFM.WAIVER_ALLOWANCE, XSFM.BSUPP_EXCESS_OPTION, BEO.OPTION_CODE, BEO.EXCESS_OPTION_DESC, XSFD.COVERAGE_ID, XSFD.CONTRIBUTION, XSG.STRATEGY_NAME, ( SELECT XBPV1.DESCR FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV XBPV1 WHERE XSFM.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPV1.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XBPV1.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = XBPV1.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPV1.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) AS BENEFIT_PLAN_DESC, CASE WHEN XSFM.FUNDING_TYPE = 'CFPCT' THEN XCC.CVRD_PERSON_DESCR ELSE XCC.DESCR END AS COVERAGE_DESC FROM XBSS_COMPANY_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XSG LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL XSFM ON XSG.STRATEGY_ID = XSFM.STRATEGY_ID AND XSG.GROUP_ID = XSFM.GROUP_ID AND PLAN_TYPE NOT IN (:voluntaryPlanTypes) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_DETAIL XSFD ON XSFD.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID = XSFM.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_CVG_CODES XCC ON XCC.COVRG_ID = XSFD.COVERAGE_ID INNER JOIN XBSS_WAIT_PERIOD_TYPE XWP ON XWP.WAITING_PERIOD = XSG.WAITING_PERIOD LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_BSUPP_EXCESS_OPTIONS BEO ON XSFM.BSUPP_EXCESS_OPTION = BEO.ID WHERE XSG.STRATEGY_ID IN (:strategyList) AND XSG.STATUS = 'A' ORDER BY XSG.STRATEGY_ID, XSG.DEFAULT_GROUP DESC, XSG.GROUP_DESCR, XCC.SORT_ORDER

SELECT XS_GROUP.GROUP_ID, XS_MODEL.PLAN_TYPE, XS_FLATMAX.COVERAGE_ID, XS_FLATMAX.CONTRIBUTION FROM XBSS_COMPANY_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XS_GROUP, XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL XS_MODEL, XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_FLTMAX XS_FLATMAX, XBSS_CVG_CODES X_COVERAGE_CODES WHERE XS_GROUP.STRATEGY_ID = XS_MODEL.STRATEGY_ID AND XS_GROUP.GROUP_ID = XS_MODEL.GROUP_ID AND XS_MODEL.ID = XS_FLATMAX.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID AND XS_FLATMAX.COVERAGE_ID = X_COVERAGE_CODES.COVRG_ID AND XS_GROUP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId ORDER BY XS_GROUP.GROUP_ID, XS_MODEL.PLAN_TYPE, X_COVERAGE_CODES.SORT_ORDER

SELECT XS_GROUP.GROUP_ID, XS_MODEL.PLAN_TYPE, XS_BP_LIMITS.COVERAGE_ID, XS_BP_LIMITS.CONTRIBUTION FROM XBSS_COMPANY_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XS_GROUP, XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL XS_MODEL, XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_BP_LIMITS XS_BP_LIMITS, XBSS_CVG_CODES X_COVERAGE_CODES WHERE XS_GROUP.STRATEGY_ID = XS_MODEL.STRATEGY_ID AND XS_GROUP.GROUP_ID = XS_MODEL.GROUP_ID AND XS_MODEL.ID = XS_BP_LIMITS.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID AND XS_BP_LIMITS.COVERAGE_ID = X_COVERAGE_CODES.COVRG_ID AND XS_GROUP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId ORDER BY XS_GROUP.GROUP_ID, XS_MODEL.PLAN_TYPE, X_COVERAGE_CODES.SORT_ORDER
SELECT PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE, SUM(ESTIMATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE WHERE STRATEGY_ID =:trinetStrategyId GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE ORDER BY PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE

SELECT STRATEGY_ID, PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE, SUM(ESTIMATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE WHERE STRATEGY_ID IN (:StrategyList) GROUP BY STRATEGY_ID, PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE ORDER BY STRATEGY_ID, PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_SUB_TYPE
SELECT DISTINCT V.STRATEGY_ID, V.GROUP_ID, V.GROUP_DESCR FROM XBSS_COMPANY_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW V WHERE V.STRATEGY_ID IN (:StrategyList) AND V.STATUS = 'A' ORDER BY 1, 3

SELECT DISTINCT V.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID, V.STRATEGY_ID, V.GROUP_ID, V.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, V.GROUP_DESCR, V.GROUP_TYPE, V.STATUS, V.DEFAULT_GROUP, V.HEADCOUNT, V.WAITING_PERIOD, V.ELIG_CONFIG1 FROM XBSS_COMPANY_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW V WHERE V.COMPANY_ID = :COMPANY_ID

SELECT CMP.REALM_YEAR_ID, R.REALM_ID, R.PLAN_YEAR_START, R.PLAN_YEAR_END, R.OE_QUARTER FROM XBSS_COMPANY CMP,XBSS_STRATEGY ST, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR R WHERE ST.ID = :strategyId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CMP.ID AND R.id = CMP.REALM_YEAR_ID

WITH ALL_RULES AS ( SELECT XRLPTR.* FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_TYPE_RULES XRLPTR , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRLPTR.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRLPTR.EFFDT AND XRLPTR.ENDDT ) SELECT RL.PLAN_TYPE FROM ALL_RULES RL WHERE RL.PLAN_TYPE NOT IN ('1D', '1V') AND ( RL.REGION IN ( :regions ) OR ( RL.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM ALL_RULES R1 WHERE R1.REGION IN ( :regions ) ) ) ) ORDER BY RL.PLAN_TYPE

SELECT XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP WHERE XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT XRPP2.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP2 WHERE STRATEGY_ID =:STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP2.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP2.PLAN_TYPE ='10' ) AND XRPP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID=:REALM_YEAR_ID AND (XRPP.SITUS = :situs OR XRPP.SITUS IS NULL) AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:OUT_OF_REGION_PLANS) MINUS SELECT DISTINCT XSGP1.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP1, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP1 WHERE STRATEGY_ID =:STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP1.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP1.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP1.PLAN_TYPE ='10'

SELECT XC.ID, XC.PLAN_SELECTION_ID, XC.COVERAGE_LEVEL, XC.ER_CONTRIB_PCT, XC.HEADCOUNT, XC.BN_EMPL_RATE, XC.BN_EMPLR_RATE, XSGP.GROUP_ID, XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XSGP.PLAN_TYPE, XSGP.STRATEGY_ID, XG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID, XC.OVERRIDE_TYPE, XRPP.WIDELY_AVAILABLE_FLAG, XRPP.PLAN_CATEGORY FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION XC, XBSS_GROUP XG, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID=:STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10','11','14','1D','1V') AND XSGP.ID = XC.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND XSGP.GROUP_ID =XG.ID AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID=:REALM_PLAN_YEAR AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN

SELECT XRD.PORTFOLIO_ID, XRD.BENEFIT_PLAN, XRD.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_DEFAULT_PLANS XRD WHERE XRD.REALM_YEAR_ID=:REALM_PLAN_YEAR AND XRD.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID=:STRATEGY_ID )

WITH EE_GRP_TRNX AS ( SELECT ESGTX.ID, ESGTX.EMPLID , ESGTX.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID , SGP.STRATEGY_ID, SGP.GROUP_ID , ESGTX.CREATE_DATE FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_STRATEGY_GROUP_TRNX ESGTX , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP WHERE SGP.ID = ESGTX.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID ), EE_LAST_TRNX AS ( SELECT TX.* FROM EE_GRP_TRNX TX WHERE TX.CREATE_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(CREATE_DATE) FROM EE_GRP_TRNX T1 WHERE T1.EMPLID = TX.EMPLID AND T1.STRATEGY_ID = TX.STRATEGY_ID ) ) SELECT NVL( LTX.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID, XSG.ID ) STRATEGY_GROUP_ID , COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY ST , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP XSG , XBSS_EMPLOYEE_STRATEGY_GROUP XESG , EE_LAST_TRNX LTX WHERE ST.ID = :strategyId AND XSG.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID AND XESG.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID = XSG.ID AND LTX.EMPLID(+) = XESG.EMPLID AND LTX.STRATEGY_ID(+) = ST.ID GROUP BY NVL( LTX.STRATEGY_GROUP_ID, XSG.ID )

SELECT DECODE(PS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 'medical', '11', 'dental', '1D', 'dental', '14', 'vision', '1V', 'vision') base_plan_type, DECODE(PS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 1, '11', 2, '1D', 2, '14', 3, '1V', 3) plan_type_order, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR GROUP_DESCR, sum(C.HEADCOUNT) HEADCOUNT, sum(C.HEADCOUNT * C.BN_EMPLR_RATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_GROUP G, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION C, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG WHERE S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND PS.STRATEGY_ID = S.ID AND PS.GROUP_ID = G.ID AND PS.ID = C.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' AND PS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) GROUP BY DECODE(PS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 'medical', '11', 'dental', '1D', 'dental', '14', 'vision', '1V', 'vision'), DECODE(PS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 1, '11', 2, '1D', 2, '14', 3, '1V', 3), S.ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR
UNION
SELECT DECODE(E.PLAN_TYPE, '20', 'LIFE', '23', 'LIFE', '30', 'DISABILITY', '31', 'DISABILITY', 'A3', 'CMTR', '67', 'HSA') base_plan_type, DECODE(E.PLAN_TYPE, '20', 4, '23', 4, '30', 5, '31', 5, 'A3', 6, '67', 7) plan_type_order, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR GROUP_DESCR, 0 HEADCOUNT, SUM(E.ESTIMATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_GROUP G, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG, XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE E WHERE S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND S.ID = E.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = E.GROUP_ID AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' AND E.PLAN_TYPE IN (:additionalPlanTypesIncludeCmtr) GROUP BY DECODE(E.PLAN_TYPE, '20', 'LIFE', '23', 'LIFE', '30', 'DISABILITY', '31', 'DISABILITY', 'A3', 'CMTR', '67', 'HSA'), DECODE(E.PLAN_TYPE, '20', 4, '23', 4, '30', 5, '31', 5, 'A3', 6, '67', 7), S.ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR, SG.HEADCOUNT
UNION
SELECT 'primaryBenefit' base_plan_type, 97 plan_type_order, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR GROUP_DESCR, 0 HEADCOUNT, sum(C.HEADCOUNT * C.BN_EMPLR_RATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_GROUP G, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION C, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG WHERE S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND PS.STRATEGY_ID = S.ID AND PS.GROUP_ID = G.ID AND PS.ID = C.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' AND PS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) GROUP BY 1, 2, S.ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR
UNION
SELECT 'additionalBenefit' base_plan_type, 98 plan_type_order, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR GROUP_DESCR, 0 HEADCOUNT, NVL(SUM(E.ESTIMATE),0) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_GROUP G, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE E ON (SG.STRATEGY_ID = E.STRATEGY_ID AND SG.GROUP_ID = E.GROUP_ID AND E.PLAN_TYPE IN (:additionalPlanTypesIncludeCmtr)) WHERE S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' GROUP BY 1, 2, S.ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR, SG.HEADCOUNT
UNION
SELECT 'total' base_plan_type, 99 plan_type_order, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM BENEFIT_PROGRAM, G.DESCR GROUP_DESCR, 0 HEADCOUNT, NVL(( SELECT (SUM(C.HEADCOUNT * C.BN_EMPLR_RATE)) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION C WHERE PS.ID = C.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND PS.STRATEGY_ID = S.ID AND PS.GROUP_ID = G.ID AND PS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes)) , 0) + NVL(( SELECT (SUM(E.ESTIMATE)) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE E WHERE E.STRATEGY_ID = S.ID AND E.GROUP_ID = G.ID AND E.PLAN_TYPE IN (:additionalPlanTypesIncludeCmtr)) , 0) total_plan_cost FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_GROUP G, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG WHERE S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND S.COMPANY_ID = G.COMPANY_ID AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' ORDER BY 4, 3, 2
UPDATE XBSS_CONTRIBUTION SET HEADCOUNT =0, HSA_HEADCOUNT =0 WHERE PLAN_SELECTION_ID IN (SELECT id FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT.STRATEGY_ID=:strategyId )
update XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT set HEADCOUNT='0' where STRATEGY_ID=:strategyId

UPDATE XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP XSG1 SET XSG1.STATUS ='P' WHERE XSG1.STATUS='D' AND XSG1.ID IN (SELECT XSG.ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY XC, XBSS_STRATEGY XS, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP XSG WHERE XS.COMPANY_ID = XC.ID AND XSG.STRATEGY_ID =XS.ID AND XS.ID <> :strategyId AND XC.ID = :companyCode )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY WHERE COMPANY_ID = :COMPANY_ID AND SUBMITTED = 1

SELECT EMPLID, STRATEGY_ID, FUTURE_GROUP_ID, FUTURE_GROUP_DESCR, FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW WHERE COMPANY_ID = :companyId AND CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM != FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT G.ID GROUP_ID, G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, SGPS.PLAN_TYPE, SGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN, BP.DESCR, CONTRIB.COVERAGE_LEVEL, CONTRIB.ER_CONTRIB_PCT, CONTRIB.BN_EMPLR_RATE, CONTRIB.BN_EMPL_RATE FROM XBSS_COMPANY C JOIN XBSS_GROUP G ON C.ID = G.COMPANY_ID JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY S ON C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS ON G.ID = SGPS.GROUP_ID AND S.ID = SGPS.STRATEGY_ID JOIN XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG ON S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BP ON SGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN JOIN XBSS_CONTRIBUTION CONTRIB ON SGPS.ID = CONTRIB.PLAN_SELECTION_ID JOIN XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY ON RPY.ID = C.REALM_YEAR_ID WHERE S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID AND BP.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(BP_ED.EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BP_ED WHERE BP.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP_ED.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BP_ED.EFFDT <= RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) AND C.CODE = :companyCode AND C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID

SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ EPAS.EMPLID EMPLID , EPAS.STRATEGY_ID STRATEGY_ID , ESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID GROUP_ID , ESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_DESCR , EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE PLAN_TYPE , EPAS.BENEFIT_PLAN BENEFIT_PLAN , NULL AS PLAN_NAME , EPAS.COVRG_CD COVERAGE_CODE , EPAS.EE_RATE EE_RATE , EPAS.ER_RATE ER_RATE , NULL AS CARRIER FROM XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT EPAS , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESGV , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS WHERE EPAS.STRATEGY_ID IN ( :strategyIds ) AND EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE IN ( :planTypes ) AND ESGV.EMPLID = EPAS.EMPLID AND ESGV.STRATEGY_ID = EPAS.STRATEGY_ID AND SGPS.STRATEGY_ID = ESGV.STRATEGY_ID AND SGPS.GROUP_ID = ESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID AND SGPS.PLAN_TYPE = EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE AND SGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN = EPAS.BENEFIT_PLAN

SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ EPAS.EMPLID EMPLID , EPAS.STRATEGY_ID STRATEGY_ID , ESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID GROUP_ID , ESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_DESCR , EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE PLAN_TYPE , EPAS.BENEFIT_PLAN BENEFIT_PLAN , BPMV.DESCR PLAN_NAME , EPAS.COVRG_CD COVERAGE_CODE , CONTRI.BN_EMPL_RATE EE_RATE , CONTRI.BN_EMPLR_RATE ER_RATE , ( SELECT DESCR FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = RPYP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) CARRIER FROM XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT EPAS , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESGV , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS , XBSS_CONTRIBUTION CONTRI , XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BPMV , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPYP WHERE EPAS.STRATEGY_ID IN ( :strategyIds ) AND EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE IN ( :planTypes ) AND ESGV.EMPLID = EPAS.EMPLID AND ESGV.STRATEGY_ID = EPAS.STRATEGY_ID AND SGPS.STRATEGY_ID = ESGV.STRATEGY_ID AND SGPS.GROUP_ID = ESGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID AND SGPS.PLAN_TYPE = EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE AND SGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN = EPAS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND CONTRI.PLAN_SELECTION_ID = SGPS.ID AND CONTRI.COVERAGE_LEVEL = EPAS.COVRG_CD AND BPMV.PLAN_TYPE = EPAS.BENEFIT_TYPE AND BPMV.BENEFIT_PLAN = EPAS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BPMV.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BP1 WHERE BP1.PLAN_TYPE = BPMV.PLAN_TYPE AND BP1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BPMV.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BP1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) AND RPYP.REALM_YEAR_ID(+) = ESGV.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RPYP.BENEFIT_PLAN(+) = BPMV.BENEFIT_PLAN

SELECT DISTINCT SGPS.STRATEGY_ID, GRP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, SGPS.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS , XBSS_GROUP GRP WHERE SGPS.STRATEGY_ID IN (:strategyList) AND SGPS.GROUP_ID = GRP.ID AND PLAN_TYPE in (:primaryPlanTypes)

SELECT PS.PLAN_TYPE, PS.BENEFIT_PLAN, BP.DESCR PLAN_DESCR, S.ID STRATEGY_ID, CC.DESCR COVERAGE_LEVEL_DESCR, SUM(C.HEADCOUNT), CC.SORT_ORDER FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION C, XBSS_CVG_CODES CC, XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BP WHERE PS.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND S.ID IN (:strategyList) AND PS.STRATEGY_ID = S.ID AND PS.ID = C.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND C.COVERAGE_LEVEL = CC.COVRG_CD AND PS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND BP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = BP.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) GROUP BY PS.PLAN_TYPE, PS.BENEFIT_PLAN, BP.DESCR, S.ID, CC.DESCR, CC.SORT_ORDER ORDER BY DECODE(PS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 1, '11', 2, '1D', 3, '14', 4, '1V', 5, 6), BP.DESCR, S.ID, CC.SORT_ORDER

SELECT DISTINCT XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID=:strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = XRPP.PLAN_TYPE AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN

SELECT DISTINCT PORT.EXCL_MED_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP , XBSS_PORTFOLIO PORT WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = XRPP.PLAN_TYPE AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID = PORT.ID AND PORT.EXCL_MED_PLAN IS NOT NULL
SELECT XRPFP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PORTFOLIO_FSA_PLAN XRPFP WHERE XRPFP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_PLAN_YEAR AND XRPFP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PORTFOLIOS)

SELECT SGP.GROUP_ID, SGP.PLAN_TYPE, SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XBPV.DESCR FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGP LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT XBPV1.DESCR, XBPV1.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV XBPV1 WHERE XBPV1.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = XBPV1.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPV1.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) XBPV ON SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPV.BENEFIT_PLAN WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND SGP.PLAN_TYPE IN (:additionalPlanTypes)

SELECT SGP.GROUP_ID, SGP.PLAN_TYPE, SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XBPV.DESCR PLAN_NAME, PEF.DESCR CARRIER_NAME, NVL(DOP.SDI_PLAN, 0) SDI_PLAN, NVL(DOP.EMPLOYEE_PAID, 0) EMPLOYEE_PAID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGP LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT XBPV1.DESCR, XBPV1.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV XBPV1 WHERE XBPV1.EFFDT = (SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = XBPV1.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPV1.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ) XBPV ON SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPV.BENEFIT_PLAN LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT PL.PLAN_TYPE, PL.BENEFIT_PLAN, PL.EMPLOYEE_PAID, CASE WHEN PL.SHORT_DESCR LIKE '%SDI%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END SDI_PLAN FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION OP , XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS PL WHERE OP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND OP.ID = PL.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID) DOP ON SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = DOP.BENEFIT_PLAN , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPYP , XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND SGP.PLAN_TYPE IN (:additionalPlanTypes) AND RPYP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND SGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = RPYP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = RPYP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= :effDate )

WITH BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT XRBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_PLANS XBP, XBSS_BUNDLE XB, XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM WHERE XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = XBP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND XB.ID = :bundleId AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XB.EFFDT AND XB.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XBP.EFFDT AND XBP.ENDDT AND XBP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PORTFOLIOS) AND XB.ID = XBP.BUNDLE_ID AND XBP.OE_QUARTER = :OE_QUARTER AND XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = :OE_QUARTER AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT ) SELECT DISTINCT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_VW.DESCR, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_VW.VENDOR_ID, PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW ON PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_PLAN_YEAR AND (PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PORTFOLIOS) OR PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:LIFE_PLAN_TYPE_LIST)) AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:PLAN_TYPE_LIST) AND ( PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11', '14', '1D', '1V') OR (:bundleId IS NULL OR PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS)) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :bundleId IS NOT NULL) ) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:OUT_OF_REGION_PLANS) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = :SITUS OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST( GREATEST(RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC(SYSDATE)), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) )

WITH BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT XRBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER_PLAN BQP, XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER BQ, XBSS_BUNDLE XB, XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM WHERE XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = BQP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND BQP.BUNDLE_QUARTER_ID = BQ.ID AND BQ.BUNDLE_ID = XB.ID AND XB.ID = :bundleId AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XB.EFFDT AND XB.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN BQ.EFFDT AND BQ.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN BQP.EFFDT AND BQP.ENDDT AND BQP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PORTFOLIOS) AND BQ.OE_QUARTER = :OE_QUARTER AND XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = :OE_QUARTER AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT ) SELECT DISTINCT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_VW.DESCR, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE, PLAN_VW.VENDOR_ID, PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS JOIN XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW ON PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_PLAN_YEAR AND (PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PORTFOLIOS) OR PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:LIFE_PLAN_TYPE_LIST)) AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:PLAN_TYPE_LIST) AND ( PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11', '14', '1D', '1V') OR (:bundleId IS NULL OR PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS)) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :bundleId IS NOT NULL) ) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:OUT_OF_REGION_PLANS) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = :SITUS OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST( GREATEST(RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC(SYSDATE)), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END ) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) )

SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN, REGION FROM XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN REALM_YEAR_PLANS WHERE REALM_YEAR_PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID IN (:REALM_PLAN_YEARS) AND REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = REALM_YEAR_PLANS.ID ORDER BY 1, 2

WITH OPTION_DATA AS ( SELECT DISTINCT OP.REALM_YEAR_ID , OP.DESCR AS OPT_DESCR , PL.BENEFIT_PLAN , PL.PLAN_TYPE , PL.DESCR AS PLAN_DESCR , CASE WHEN UPPER(PL.SHORT_DESCR) LIKE '%SDI%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SDI_PLAN , OP.REGION , OP.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE , OP.DISPLAY_SEQ FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION OP , XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS PL WHERE OP.REALM_YEAR_ID IN (:realmPlanYearId) AND OP.ID = PL.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND ( OP.REGION = :regions OR ( OP.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO, XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS XDOP WHERE XDO.REALM_YEAR_ID IN (:realmPlanYearId) AND XDO.ID = XDOP.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND XDO.REGION = :regions ) ) ) AND PL.EMPLOYEE_PAID = 0 AND OP.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE NOT IN (:groupTypeExclude)
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT OP.REALM_YEAR_ID , OP.DESCR AS OPT_DESCR , PL.BENEFIT_PLAN , PL.PLAN_TYPE , PL.DESCR AS PLAN_DESCR , CASE WHEN UPPER(PL.SHORT_DESCR) LIKE '%SDI%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS SDI_PLAN , OP.REGION , OP.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE , OP.DISPLAY_SEQ FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION OP , XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS PL WHERE OP.REALM_YEAR_ID IN (:prevRealmPlanYearId) AND OP.ID = PL.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND ( OP.REGION = :regions OR ( OP.REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION XDO, XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS XDOP WHERE XDO.REALM_YEAR_ID IN (:prevRealmPlanYearId) AND XDO.ID = XDOP.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID AND XDO.REGION = :regions ) ) ) AND PL.EMPLOYEE_PAID = 0 AND OP.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE NOT IN (:groupTypeExclude) ) SELECT ODT.OPT_DESCR , ODT.BENEFIT_PLAN , ODT.PLAN_TYPE , ODT.PLAN_DESCR , ODT.SDI_PLAN , ODT.REGION , ODT.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE , ODT.DISPLAY_SEQ FROM OPTION_DATA ODT WHERE ODT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId OR ( ODT.REALM_YEAR_ID = :prevRealmPlanYearId AND 0 = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OPTION_DATA OP1 WHERE OP1.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND OP1.BENEFIT_PLAN = ODT.BENEFIT_PLAN ) )
SELECT MIN( CREATED_DT ) CREATED_DT FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS WHERE COMPANY = :company AND REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmYearId

SELECT ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EPM.PLAN_TYPE , EPM.BENEFIT_PLAN , EPM.PORTFOLIO_ID , PEF.DESCR , EPD.COVRG_CD AS COVRG_CD_MAPPED , COUNT(DISTINCT EC.EMPLID) AS ENROLLED_COUNT , CASE WHEN EPM.PLAN_TYPE = '10' THEN SUM(EC.HSA_ENROLLEE) ELSE 0 END AS HSA_ENROLLED_COUNT FROM XBSS_STRATEGY ST , XBSS_COMPANY CO , XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC , XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA EPD , XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING EPM , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESGV , XBSS_PORTFOLIO P , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE ST.ID = :strategyId AND CO.ID = ST.COMPANY_ID AND EC.COMPANY = CO.CODE AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = CO.REALM_YEAR_ID AND EC.ID = EPD.EE_CEN_ID AND EPD.ID = EPM.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID AND EPD.BENEFIT_PLAN <> 'Waive' AND P.ID = EPM.PORTFOLIO_ID AND RPY.ID = CO.REALM_YEAR_ID AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = P.ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START ) AND ESGV.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND ESGV.EMPL_RCD = EC.EMPL_RCD AND ESGV.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID GROUP BY ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EPM.PLAN_TYPE , EPM.BENEFIT_PLAN , EPM.PORTFOLIO_ID , PEF.DESCR , EPD.COVRG_CD
SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(DISTINCT EC.EMPLID) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD, COUNT(*), CASE WHEN ED.PLAN_TYPE = '10' THEN SUM(EC.HSA_ENROLLEE) ELSE 0 END FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' AND ED.MRR_PLAN_ENRL = 0 GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD

SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, EPM.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD, COUNT(*), CASE WHEN ED.PLAN_TYPE = '10' THEN SUM(EC.HSA_ENROLLEE) ELSE 0 END FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING EPM WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EPM.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID = ED.ID AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND ED.PLAN_TYPE = EPM.PLAN_TYPE AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' AND ED.MRR_PLAN_ENRL = 0 AND EPM.PRIMARY_VENDOR = 'PRIM' GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, EPM.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD

SELECT ED.BENEFIT_PLAN CURRENT_BENEFIT_PLAN, EPM.BENEFIT_PLAN NEXT_BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD, COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_MAPPING EPM ON ED.ID = EPM.EMP_PLAN_DATA_ID AND ED.PLAN_TYPE = EPM.PLAN_TYPE AND EPM.PRIMARY_VENDOR = 'PRIM' WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND ED.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' AND ED.MRR_PLAN_ENRL = 0 GROUP BY ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, EPM.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD

SELECT DISTINCT XG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM,XSGP.PLAN_TYPE, XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_GROUP XG WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID=:strategyId AND XSGP.GROUP_ID = XG.ID AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = XRPP.PLAN_TYPE AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN

WITH ERROR_LIST AS ( SELECT DISTINCT SS.COMPANY, SS.STRATEGY_ID, SS.USER_ID, SS.EMAIL_SENT_STATUS, SS.STATEMENT_UPLOAD_STATUS, R.BEN_EXCHNG, RPY.OE_QUARTER FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, XBSS_REALM R, XBSS_SUBMIT_STATUS SS WHERE SS.EMAIL_SENT_STATUS = 'N' AND SS.SEND_EMAIL = 'Y' AND SS.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID AND RPY.REALM_ID = R.ID AND SS.ID = (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM XBSS_SUBMIT_STATUS SUB_SS WHERE SS.COMPANY = SUB_SS.COMPANY AND SS.REALM_YEAR_ID = SUB_SS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) UNION SELECT DISTINCT SS.COMPANY, SS.STRATEGY_ID, SS.USER_ID, SS.EMAIL_SENT_STATUS, SS.STATEMENT_UPLOAD_STATUS, R.BEN_EXCHNG, RPY.OE_QUARTER FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, XBSS_REALM R, XBSS_SUBMIT_STATUS SS WHERE SS.STATEMENT_UPLOAD_STATUS = 'ERROR' AND SS.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID AND RPY.REALM_ID = R.ID AND SS.ID = (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM XBSS_SUBMIT_STATUS SUB_SS WHERE SS.COMPANY = SUB_SS.COMPANY AND SS.REALM_YEAR_ID = SUB_SS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) ) SELECT DISTINCT EL.STATEMENT_UPLOAD_STATUS, EL.EMAIL_SENT_STATUS, EL.STRATEGY_ID, EL.COMPANY, EL.BEN_EXCHNG, EL.OE_QUARTER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.DESCRIPTION, PERSONS.PERS_KEY, PERSONS.FIRST_NAME, PERSONS.NAME, S.SUBMITDATE, CASE WHEN EL.USER_ID = PERSONS.PERS_KEY THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SUBMITTER FROM XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_COMPANY C, ERROR_LIST EL LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ARV.ORGID, KY.PERS_KEY, NA.FIRST_NAME, NA.NAME FROM ALLROLES_VW ARV, PERSON_KEYS KY, PERSON_NAMES NA WHERE ARV.S_ROLE = 'CDM' AND KY.PERSONID = ARV.PERSONID AND KY.PERS_KEY_TYPE = 2 AND NA.PERSONID = KY.PERSONID AND NA.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN NA.EFFDT AND NA.ENDDT ) PERSONS ON PERSONS.ORGID = EL.COMPANY WHERE EL.STRATEGY_ID = S.ID AND S.COMPANY_ID = C.ID ORDER BY 4, 3, 11, 10
select id, excess_option_desc from xbss_bsupp_excess_options
SELECT plan_type, description FROM xbss_bsupp_vol_plan_types WHERE realm_id = :realmId ORDER BY display_order ASC
select plan_type from xbss_stratg_fund_bsupp_pln_tp where strategy_funding_id=:fundingModel

SELECT SPT.PLAN_TYPE, PT.DESCRIPTION FROM XBSS_STRATG_FUND_BSUPP_PLN_TP SPT LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_BSUPP_VOL_PLAN_TYPES PT ON SPT.PLAN_TYPE = PT.PLAN_TYPE AND PT.REALM_ID = :realmId AND PT.PLAN_TYPE != 'XX' WHERE SPT.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID = :strategyFundingId AND (:includeGroupExcessOptions = 1 OR PT.PLAN_TYPE != 'XX') ORDER BY PT.DISPLAY_ORDER
SELECT REGION FROM XBSS_COMPANY_REGIONS WHERE COMPANY_ID=:companyId
INSERT INTO XBSS_COMPANY_REGIONS ( COMPANY_ID, REGION) VALUES ( :companyId, :region)
delete from XBSS_COMPANY_REGIONS where COMPANY_ID = :companyId

SELECT DISTINCT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) AND REGIONS.REGION IN (:regions) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = :situs OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND REGIONS.MANDATORY_FLAG = 1 AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = '10' UNION SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = :situs OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGIONS.REGION IN (:regions) OR REGIONS.REGION IS NULL ) AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( SELECT PLANS_3.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS_3 LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLANS REGIONS_3 ON REGIONS_3.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS_3.ID WHERE PLANS_3.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND REGIONS_3.REGION IN (:regions) AND REGIONS_3.MANDATORY_FLAG = 1 ) )

WITH BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT XRBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_PLANS XBP INNER JOIN XBSS_BUNDLE XB ON XB.ID = XBP.BUNDLE_ID AND XBP.OE_QUARTER = (:oeQuarter) INNER JOIN XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM ON XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = XBP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = (:oeQuarter) WHERE XB.ID = :bundleId AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XB.EFFDT AND XB.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XBP.EFFDT AND XBP.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT AND XBP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) )
SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) AND (PLANS.SITUS = :situs OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL) AND ((:bundleId IS NULL AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = '10') OR PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS)) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :bundleId IS NOT NULL) MINUS SELECT DISTINCT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PLAN_TYPE = '10'

WITH BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT XRBPM.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER_PLAN BQP INNER JOIN XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER BQ ON BQP.BUNDLE_QUARTER_ID = BQ.ID AND BQ.OE_QUARTER = (:oeQuarter) INNER JOIN XBSS_BUNDLE XB ON BQ.BUNDLE_ID = XB.ID INNER JOIN XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM ON XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID = BQP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = (:oeQuarter) WHERE XB.ID = :bundleId AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XB.EFFDT AND XB.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN BQ.EFFDT AND BQ.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN BQP.EFFDT AND BQP.ENDDT AND TO_DATE(:effDt) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT AND BQP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) ) SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) AND (PLANS.SITUS = :situs OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL) AND ((:bundleId IS NULL AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = '10') OR PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN IN (SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS)) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :bundleId IS NOT NULL) MINUS SELECT DISTINCT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PLAN_TYPE = '10'
DELETE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:benefitPlans)
DELETE FROM XBSS_CONTRIBUTION WHERE PLAN_SELECTION_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND BENEFIT_PLAN IN (:benefitPlans) )

SELECT STRATEGY_ID, OPTION_ID, ANNUAL_EE_AMOUNT, ANNUAL_FAMILY_AMOUNT, ANNUAL_MONTH, QUARTERLY_EE_AMOUNT, QUARTERLY_FAMILY_AMOUNT, Q1_MONTH, Q2_MONTH, Q3_MONTH, Q4_MONTH, MONTHLY_EE_AMOUNT, MONTHLY_FAMILY_AMOUNT FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_HSA_FUNDING WHERE STRATEGY_ID IN (:strategyList)

SELECT PS.ID, PS.STRATEGY_ID, PS.GROUP_ID, PS.PLAN_TYPE, PS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PS.HEADCOUNT, PS.PPO, P.HDHP FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN P WHERE PS.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PS.GROUP_ID = :groupId AND PS.BENEFIT_PLAN = P.BENEFIT_PLAN AND P.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId
SELECT CLONE_BENEFIT_PLAN, HSA_BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_HSA_PLAN_MAP WHERE COMPANY = :company

MERGE INTO XBSS_HSA_PLAN_MAP TGT USING ( SELECT :company AS COMPANY , :clonePlan AS CLONE_BENEFIT_PLAN , :newPlan AS HSA_BENEFIT_PLAN FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( TGT.COMPANY = SRC.COMPANY AND TGT.CLONE_BENEFIT_PLAN = SRC.CLONE_BENEFIT_PLAN )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TGT.COMPANY, TGT.CLONE_BENEFIT_PLAN, TGT.HSA_BENEFIT_PLAN ) VALUES ( SRC.COMPANY, SRC.CLONE_BENEFIT_PLAN, SRC.HSA_BENEFIT_PLAN )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.HSA_BENEFIT_PLAN = SRC.HSA_BENEFIT_PLAN

SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD, COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.ID = ED.EE_CEN_ID AND ED.MRR_PLAN_ENRL <> 0 AND ED.COVRG_CD = '1' GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD

SELECT EC.EMPLID , ED.PLAN_TYPE , RPY.ACA_FPL_AMOUNT FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID AND EC.ID = ED.EE_CEN_ID AND ED.MRR_PLAN_ENRL <> 0 AND ED.COVRG_CD = '1'

SELECT DISTINCT PEF.DESCR FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PYP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO RP , XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE PS.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PS.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND PYP.PLAN_TYPE = PS.PLAN_TYPE AND PYP.BENEFIT_PLAN = PS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN RP.EFFDT AND RP.ENDDT AND RP.PORTFOLIO_ID = PYP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND RP.PRIMARY_PORTFOLIO = 1 AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = RP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= :planStartDate )

SELECT G.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, M.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_COMPANY C, XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL M, XBSS_GROUP G WHERE C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID AND C.ID = G.COMPANY_ID AND S.ID = M.STRATEGY_ID AND G.ID = M.GROUP_ID AND C.CODE = :companyCode AND C.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND S.SUBMITTED = 1 AND M.FUNDING_TYPE = 'EEC'

SELECT DISTINCT XASP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT XAS, XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN XASP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP WHERE XAS.ID = XASP.AUTOSELECT_ID AND XASP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND XASP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XAS.ID IN ( SELECT XAS1.ID FROM XBSS_AUTOSELECT XAS1, XBSS_AUTOSELECT_PLAN XASP1, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP1 WHERE XASP1.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND XASP1.AUTOSELECT_ID = XAS1.ID AND XSGP1.BENEFIT_PLAN = XASP1.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XSGP1.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XASP1.PLAN_TYPE = '10' ) AND XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:portfolios) AND XRPP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XASP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :planYearId AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) AND ( XRPP.SITUS = :situs OR XRPP.SITUS IS NULL ) MINUS SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId
SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN WHERE WIDELY_AVAILABLE_FLAG = 1 AND PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId
SELECT BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN WHERE WIDELY_AVAILABLE_FLAG = 1 AND PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND BENEFIT_PLAN in :benefitPlanList AND REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId
