SELECT DISTINCT vpm.newplanid ALT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, xbss_realm_vendor_plan_mapping vpm, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE RPY.ID = RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND vpm.oldplanid IN (:benefit_plans) AND vpm.newplanid = RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN and vpm.oe_quarter = rpy.oe_quarter AND RPP.PLAN_TYPE ='10' AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START between vpm.EFFDT and vpm.enddt AND vpm.mapping_type = 'A' -- unions can be removed once Q1 2021 plan year is complete and mappings for all quarters are in xbss_realm_vendor_plan_mapping UNION SELECT BPME.BENEFIT_PLAN ALT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, BENEFIT_PLAN_MAPPING_EXCL BPME, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE RPY.ID = RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND BPME.BENEFIT_PLAN_OLD IN (:benefit_plans) AND BPME.BENEFIT_PLAN = RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RPP.PLAN_TYPE ='10' AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START = BPME.EFFDT AND BPME.BENEFIT_PLAN <> BPME.BENEFIT_PLAN_OLD UNION SELECT BPM.BENEFIT_PLAN ALT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, BENEFIT_PLAN_MAPPING BPM, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE RPY.ID = RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND RPY.ID = :realmYearId AND BPM.BENEFIT_PLAN_OLD IN (:benefit_plans) AND BPM.BENEFIT_PLAN = RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND RPP.PLAN_TYPE ='10' AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START = BPM.EFFDT AND BPM.BENEFIT_PLAN <> BPM.BENEFIT_PLAN_OLD
SELECT MAX( STEP.STATUS ) FROM OLP_PROCESS_TBL STEP WHERE STEP.OLP_ID = ( SELECT OL.OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL OL WHERE OL.COMPANY = :company AND OL.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient )

SELECT OLP_ID, STATUS, TIME_STAMP FROM ( SELECT * FROM OLP_PROCESS_TBL WHERE OLP_ID = ( SELECT OL.OLP_ID FROM OLP_COMPANY_MAPPING_TBL OL WHERE OL.COMPANY = :company AND OL.PF_CLIENT = :pfClient ) AND STATUS >= 50 ORDER BY STATUS ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

update XBSS_STRATEGY set status='I' where id in (WITH SUBMITTED_STRAT AS ( SELECT CO.CODE, ST.* FROM XBSS_COMPANY CO , XBSS_STRATEGY ST WHERE CO.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CO.ID AND ST.SUBMITTED = 1 ), SUBMITTED_BENPROGS AS ( SELECT SUB.ID, GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM SUBMITTED_STRAT SUB , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP , XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = SUB.ID AND GP.ID = SGP.GROUP_ID ), UNSUBMITTED_STRAT AS ( SELECT CO.CODE, ST.* FROM XBSS_COMPANY CO , XBSS_STRATEGY ST WHERE CO.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CO.ID AND ST.SUBMITTED != 1 ), UNSUBMITTED_BENPROGS AS ( SELECT UN.ID, GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM UNSUBMITTED_STRAT UN , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP , XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = UN.ID AND GP.ID = SGP.GROUP_ID ) SELECT UN.ID UNSUBMITTED_ID FROM UNSUBMITTED_STRAT UN WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM SUBMITTED_BENPROGS SBP WHERE SBP.ID = ( SELECT SST.ID FROM SUBMITTED_STRAT SST WHERE SST.CODE = UN.CODE ) MINUS SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM UNSUBMITTED_BENPROGS UBP WHERE UBP.ID = UN.ID ))

update XBSS_STRATEGY set status='I' where id in ( WITH SUBMITTED_STRAT AS ( SELECT ST.* FROM XBSS_COMPANY CO , XBSS_STRATEGY ST WHERE CO.CODE = :companyCode AND CO.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CO.ID AND ST.SUBMITTED = 1 ), SUBMITTED_BENPROGS AS ( SELECT SUB.ID, GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM SUBMITTED_STRAT SUB , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP , XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = SUB.ID AND GP.ID = SGP.GROUP_ID ), UNSUBMITTED_STRAT AS ( SELECT ST.* FROM XBSS_COMPANY CO , XBSS_STRATEGY ST WHERE CO.CODE = :companyCode AND CO.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ST.COMPANY_ID = CO.ID AND ST.SUBMITTED != 1 ), UNSUBMITTED_BENPROGS AS ( SELECT UN.ID, GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM UNSUBMITTED_STRAT UN , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP , XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE SGP.STRATEGY_ID = UN.ID AND GP.ID = SGP.GROUP_ID ) SELECT UN.ID UNSUBMITTED_ID FROM UNSUBMITTED_STRAT UN WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM SUBMITTED_BENPROGS MINUS SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM UNSUBMITTED_BENPROGS UBP WHERE UBP.ID = UN.ID ))

SELECT OLDPLANID, OLDPORTFOLIOID, NEWPLANID, NEWPORTFOLIOID, PLANTYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_VENDOR_PLAN_MAPPING WHERE OE_QUARTER =:oeQuarter AND ENDDT >=:effDt AND MAPPING_TYPE NOT IN ('A', 'N') AND NEWPLANID NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) ORDER BY DECODE(MAPPING_TYPE, 'S', 1, 'P', 2, 'G', 3, 4), DECODE(OLDPORTFOLIOID, NEWPORTFOLIOID, 1, 2), OLDPLANID, NEWPLANID

SELECT OLDPLANID, OLDPORTFOLIOID, NEWPLANID, NEWPORTFOLIOID, PLANTYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_VENDOR_PLAN_MAPPING WHERE OE_QUARTER =:oeQuarter AND ENDDT >=:effDt AND MAPPING_TYPE ='P' AND NEWPLANID NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans)

SELECT XE.EMPLID , XE.EMPL_RCD , COALESCE( XE.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, XE.CURRENT_BENEFIT_PROGRAM ) AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XE WHERE XE.CODE = :companyCode AND XE.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XE.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId

WITH EMPLOYEE_CENSUS_DATA AS ( SELECT EC.ID, EC.EMPLID, N.FIRST_NAME, N.MIDDLE_NAME, N.LAST_NAME, EC.DEPTID, D.DESCR DEPT_DESCR, EC.LOCATION, L.DESCR LOC_DESCR, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER N, PS_DEPT_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER D, PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND N.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND N.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND N.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( N1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = N.EMPLID AND N1.NAME_TYPE = N.NAME_TYPE AND N1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND D.DEPTID = EC.DEPTID AND D.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( D1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_DEPT_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER D1 WHERE D1.SETID = D.SETID AND D1.DEPTID = D.DEPTID AND D1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND L.LOCATION = EC.LOCATION AND L.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( L1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L1 WHERE L1.SETID = L.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = L.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT < :effDate ) ) SELECT EC.EMPLID, EC.FIRST_NAME, EC.MIDDLE_NAME, EC.LAST_NAME, EC.DEPTID, EC.DEPT_DESCR, EC.LOCATION, EC.LOC_DESCR, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, B.DESCR PLAN_NAME, ED.COVRG_CD, TO_CHAR('E') COVERAGE_ELECT FROM EMPLOYEE_CENSUS_DATA EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED, XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != '0003M3' AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN = B.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV B1 WHERE B1.PLAN_TYPE = B.PLAN_TYPE AND B1.BENEFIT_PLAN = B.BENEFIT_PLAN AND B1.EFFDT <= :effDate) UNION SELECT EC.EMPLID, EC.FIRST_NAME, EC.MIDDLE_NAME, EC.LAST_NAME, EC.DEPTID, EC.DEPT_DESCR, EC.LOCATION, EC.LOC_DESCR, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, NULL, ED.COVRG_CD, TO_CHAR('W') COVERAGE_ELECT FROM EMPLOYEE_CENSUS_DATA EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN = 'Waive' UNION SELECT EC.EMPLID, EC.FIRST_NAME, EC.MIDDLE_NAME, EC.LAST_NAME, EC.DEPTID, EC.DEPT_DESCR, EC.LOCATION, EC.LOC_DESCR, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, TO_CHAR('N') COVERAGE_ELECT FROM EMPLOYEE_CENSUS_DATA EC WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID)

SELECT EC.EMPLID, EC.EMPL_RCD, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, ED.PLAN_TYPE, ED.BENEFIT_PLAN, ED.COVRG_CD, DECODE(ED.PLAN_TYPE, '10', EC.HSA_ENROLLEE, 0) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ED.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' AND ED.MRR_PLAN_ENRL = 0

SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ED.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN = 'Waive' GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT ESG.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(*) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESG WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.EMPLID = ESG.EMPLID AND EC.EMPL_RCD = ESG.EMPL_RCD AND EC.COMPANY = ESG.CODE AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ESG.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND ED.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN = 'Waive' GROUP BY ESG.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(DISTINCT EC.EMPLID) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ED.PLAN_TYPE IN (:planTypes) AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM

SELECT ESG.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, COUNT(DISTINCT EC.EMPLID) FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, XBSS_EMPLOYEE_PLAN_DATA ED, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESG WHERE ED.EE_CEN_ID = EC.ID AND EC.EMPLID = ESG.EMPLID AND EC.EMPL_RCD = ESG.EMPL_RCD AND EC.COMPANY = ESG.CODE AND EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ESG.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND ED.PLAN_TYPE IN (:planTypes) AND ED.BENEFIT_PLAN != 'Waive' GROUP BY ESG.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM

WITH ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG AS ( SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, L.STATE, COUNT(*) AS STATE_COUNT FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND L.LOCATION = EC.LOCATION AND L.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( L1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L1 WHERE L1.SETID = L.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = L.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT < :effDate ) GROUP BY EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, L.STATE) SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'IN' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) AS ELIG_COUNT FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE STATE IN (:sdiStates) GROUP BY BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'IN'
UNION
SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'OUT' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE NOT ( STATE IN (:sdiStates) ) GROUP BY BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'OUT'

WITH ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG AS ( SELECT ESG.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM as BENEFIT_PROGRAM, L.STATE, COUNT(*) AS STATE_COUNT FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESG WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ESG.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND EC.EMPLID = ESG.EMPLID AND EC.EMPL_RCD = ESG.EMPL_RCD AND EC.COMPANY = ESG.CODE AND L.LOCATION = EC.LOCATION AND L.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( L1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L1 WHERE L1.SETID = L.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = L.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT < :effDate ) GROUP BY ESG.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM, L.STATE) SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'IN' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) AS ELIG_COUNT FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE STATE IN (:sdiStates) GROUP BY BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'IN'
UNION
SELECT BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'OUT' AS STATE_GROUP, SUM( STATE_COUNT ) FROM ELIG_BY_BEN_PROG WHERE NOT ( STATE IN (:sdiStates) ) GROUP BY BENEFIT_PROGRAM, 'OUT'

SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN PY.PLAN_YEAR_START AND PY.PLAN_YEAR_END THEN 'current' ELSE 'future' END PLAN_YEAR_TYPE, C.ID COMPANY_ID, PY.ID REALM_PLAN_YEAR_ID, R.BEN_EXCHNG, PY.OE_QUARTER, PY.PLAN_YEAR_START, PY.PLAN_YEAR_END FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PY, XBSS_REALM R, XBSS_COMPANY C WHERE R.id = PY.REALM_ID AND PY.ID = C.REALM_YEAR_ID AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= PY.PLAN_YEAR_END AND C.code = :companyCode

WITH MID_YEAR_SCHEDULE AS ( SELECT M.ID, M.COMPANY_ID, M.SERVICE_ORDER_NUM, M.MID_YEAR_EFFDT, M.ACTIVE, M.LASTUPDATEDBY, M.UPDTDTTM, PY.OE_QUARTER, PY.REALM_ID, PY.ID RPY_ID, PY.PLAN_YEAR_START, PY.PLAN_YEAR_END, C.CODE FROM XBSS_SCHED_MID_YEAR_FUNDING M, XBSS_COMPANY C, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PY WHERE M.COMPANY_ID = C.ID AND C.CODE = :companyCode AND M.ACTIVE = 1 AND C.REALM_YEAR_ID = PY.ID ), COMPANY_SCHED_TBL AS ( SELECT PY2.*, ST.* , ( CASE ST.COMPANY WHEN MY.CODE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) PRIORITY FROM MID_YEAR_SCHEDULE MY , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PY2 , XBSS_SCHED_TBL ST WHERE PY2.ID > MY.RPY_ID AND PY2.REALM_ID = MY.REALM_ID AND PY2.OE_QUARTER = MY.OE_QUARTER AND PY2.ID = ST.REALM_YEAR_ID AND ST.COMPANY IN ( MY.CODE, 'DEFAULT' ) ) SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN MY.PLAN_YEAR_START AND MY.PLAN_YEAR_END THEN 0 ELSE 1 END IS_FUTURE_YEAR , ( SELECT DECODE( COUNT( * ), 0, 0, 1 ) FROM COMPANY_SCHED_TBL CST WHERE PRIORITY = ( SELECT MAX( PRIORITY ) FROM COMPANY_SCHED_TBL ) AND ( TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= CST.OPEN_DT OR TRUNC(SYSDATE) >= CST.INTRNL_OPEN_DT ) ) FUTURE_YEAR_EXISTS , MY.ID , MY.COMPANY_ID , MY.SERVICE_ORDER_NUM , MY.MID_YEAR_EFFDT , MY.ACTIVE , MY.LASTUPDATEDBY , MY.UPDTDTTM FROM MID_YEAR_SCHEDULE MY

SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN PY.PLAN_YEAR_START AND PY.PLAN_YEAR_END THEN 'current' ELSE 'future' END PLAN_YEAR_TYPE, PY.ID REALM_PLAN_YEAR_ID, PY.PLAN_YEAR_START, PY.PLAN_YEAR_END, ST.OPEN_DT, ST.CLOSE_DT, ST.INTRNL_OPEN_DT, ST.INTRNL_CLOSE_DT, ST.EXTN_ENDDT FROM XBSS_REALM R, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PY LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_SCHED_TBL ST ON ST.REALM_YEAR_ID = PY.ID WHERE R.ID = PY.REALM_ID AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) <= PY.PLAN_YEAR_END AND PY.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND (ST.COMPANY = :companyCode OR ((ST.COMPANY = 'DEFAULT' OR 'DEFAULT' = :companyCode) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM XBSS_SCHED_TBL ST2 WHERE ST2.COMPANY = :companyCode AND ST2.REALM_YEAR_ID = ST.REALM_YEAR_ID)))

SELECT EC.EMPLID, EC.EMPL_RCD, N.NAME, D.DESCR DEPT_DESCR, L.DESCR LOC_DESCR, ASGN.BUSINESS_TITLE JC_DESCR, EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER N, PS_DEPT_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER D, PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L, PS_PER_ORG_ASGN@HRDB_SEEKER ASGN WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND N.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND N.NAME_TYPE = 'PRI' AND N.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( N1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_NAMES@HRDB_SEEKER N1 WHERE N1.EMPLID = N.EMPLID AND N1.NAME_TYPE = N.NAME_TYPE AND N1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND D.DEPTID = EC.DEPTID AND D.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( D1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_DEPT_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER D1 WHERE D1.SETID = D.SETID AND D1.DEPTID = D.DEPTID AND D1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND L.LOCATION = EC.LOCATION AND L.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( L1.EFFDT ) FROM PS_LOCATION_TBL@HRDB_SEEKER L1 WHERE L1.SETID = L.SETID AND L1.LOCATION = L.LOCATION AND L1.EFFDT < :effDate ) AND ASGN.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND ASGN.EMPL_RCD = EC.EMPL_RCD

SELECT EC.BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EC.EMPLID, JHIST.ANNUAL_RT, JHIST.ANNL_BENEF_BASE_RT FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER JHIST WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND JHIST.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND JHIST.EMPL_RCD = EC.EMPL_RCD AND JHIST.COMPANY = EC.COMPANY AND JHIST.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( JHIST.EMPLID LIKE 'C%' ) AND NOT ( JHIST.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND JHIST.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND JHIST.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND JHIST.STD_HOURS >= 30 AND JHIST.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER JH1 WHERE JH1.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND JH1.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND JH1.EFFDT <= GREATEST( TO_DATE( :effDate ), ( SELECT MIN(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER MINJ WHERE MINJ.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND MINJ.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND MINJ.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( MINJ.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) AND MINJ.REG_TEMP = 'R' AND MINJ.FULL_PART_TIME = 'F' AND MINJ.STD_HOURS >= 30 ) )) AND JHIST.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER JH2 WHERE JH2.EMPLID = JHIST.EMPLID AND JH2.EMPL_RCD = JHIST.EMPL_RCD AND JH2.EFFDT = JHIST.EFFDT )

SELECT XE.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM AS BENEFIT_PROGRAM, EC.EMPLID, J.ANNUAL_RT, J.ANNL_BENEF_BASE_RT FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC, PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER J, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XE WHERE EC.COMPANY = :companyCode AND EC.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XE.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XE.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND XE.CODE = EC.COMPANY AND J.EMPLID = EC.EMPLID AND J.EMPL_RCD = EC.EMPL_RCD AND J.COMPANY = EC.COMPANY AND J.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX( EFFDT ) FROM PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER J1 WHERE J1.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J1.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J1.EFFDT <= GREATEST( TO_DATE( :effDate ), ( SELECT MIN(EFFDT) FROM PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER MINJ WHERE MINJ.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND MINJ.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND MINJ.BEN_STATUS IN ('A','P','U') AND NOT ( MINJ.EMPL_CLASS = 'U' ) ))) AND J.EFFSEQ = ( SELECT MAX( EFFSEQ ) FROM PS_JOB@HRDB_SEEKER J2 WHERE J2.EMPLID = J.EMPLID AND J2.EMPL_RCD = J.EMPL_RCD AND J2.EFFDT = J.EFFDT )
SELECT EMPLID, EMPL_RCD FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_CENSUS EC WHERE COMPANY = :companyCode

DELETE FROM XBSS_EMPLOYEE_STRATEGY_GROUP WHERE STRATEGY_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP.ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY, XBSS_STRATEGY, XBSS_GROUP, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP WHERE XBSS_STRATEGY.COMPANY_ID = XBSS_COMPANY.ID AND XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP.STRATEGY_ID = XBSS_STRATEGY.ID AND XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP.GROUP_ID = XBSS_GROUP.ID AND XBSS_COMPANY.REALM_YEAR_ID =:realmYearId AND XBSS_COMPANY.CODE =:company )
update XBSS_COMPANY set ACA_LARGE_EMPLR = :acaLargeEmplr where ID = :companyId

SELECT st.bss_started, sub.bss_submitted FROM ( SELECT co.code, 'true' AS bss_started FROM xbss_company co WHERE code = :companyCode AND ROWNUM = 1) st LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ss.company, ss.status, 'true' AS bss_submitted FROM xbss_submit_status ss WHERE ss.company = :companyCode AND ss.status = 'SUCCESS' AND ROWNUM = 1 ) sub ON st.code = sub.company

UPDATE XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_DETAIL D SET D.CONTRIBUTION = :contribution WHERE D.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID = ( SELECT M.ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL M WHERE M.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND M.GROUP_ID = :groupId AND M.PLAN_TYPE = :planType) AND D.COVERAGE_ID = :coverageLevel

UPDATE XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_FLTMAX D SET D.CONTRIBUTION = :contribution WHERE D.STRATEGY_FUNDING_ID = ( SELECT M.ID FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_FUNDING_MODEL M WHERE M.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND M.GROUP_ID = :groupId AND M.PLAN_TYPE = :planType) AND D.COVERAGE_ID = :coverageLevel

SELECT PS.GROUP_ID groupId, PS.PLAN_TYPE plan_type FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PS , XBSS_CONTRIBUTION CONTRIB WHERE SG.STATUS = 'A' AND SG.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PS.STRATEGY_ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND PS.GROUP_ID = SG.GROUP_ID AND PS.ID = CONTRIB.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND CONTRIB.OVERRIDE_TYPE != 'BASE' GROUP BY PS.GROUP_ID, PS.PLAN_TYPE

select sgps.strategy_id stategy_id, g.benefit_program, sgps.BENEFIT_PLAN from xbss_strategy_group_planselect sgps, xbss_strategy s, xbss_group g where sgps.GROUP_ID = g.id and sgps.STRATEGY_ID = s.id and s.id in (:strategyIds) and s.status = 'A' and g.status = 'A'

WITH base AS (SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR from rpy.PLAN_YEAR_START) curr_year FROM xbss_realm_plan_year rpy WHERE :planYearDate BETWEEN rpy.PLAN_YEAR_START AND rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END AND rpy.OE_QUARTER = :quarterName)
SELECT CASE WHEN b.curr_year = EXTRACT(YEAR from rpy.plan_year_start) THEN 'current' ELSE 'future' END plan_year, rpy.id realm_year_id, rpy.plan_year_start planYearStartDate, rpy.plan_year_end planYearEndDate FROM xbss_realm_plan_year rpy, base b WHERE rpy.OE_QUARTER = :quarterName AND to_number(EXTRACT(YEAR from rpy.plan_year_start)) BETWEEN to_number((b.curr_year-:lastXYears)) AND to_number((b.curr_year+:nextXYears))

select distinct nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_ID from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = sgps.BENEFIT_PLAN and rbpm.REALM_ID = rpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt ), sgps.BENEFIT_PLAN) benefit_plan, case sgps.plan_type when ('10') then '10' when ('11') then '11' when ('1D') then '11' when ('14') then '14' when ('1V') then '14' end AS plan_type, nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_DESCR from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = sgps.BENEFIT_PLAN and rbpm.REALM_ID = rpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt ), bpv.descr) planDescr from xbss_strategy_group_planselect sgps, xbss_benef_plan_mv bpv, xbss_strategy s, xbss_group g, xbss_company c, xbss_realm_plan_year rpy where sgps.strategy_id = s.id and sgps.group_id = g.id and sgps.PLAN_TYPE in ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') and sgps.BENEFIT_PLAN = bpv.BENEFIT_PLAN and sgps.PLAN_TYPE = bpv.PLAN_TYPE and bpv.EFFDT = ( select max(EFFDT) from xbss_benef_plan_mv bpv1 where bpv1.BENEFIT_PLAN = bpv.BENEFIT_PLAN and bpv1.PLAN_TYPE = bpv.PLAN_TYPE and bpv1.EFFDT <= rpy.plan_year_end ) and s.submitted = 1 and s.status = 'A' and g.status = 'A' and s.company_id = c.id and c.code = :companyCode and c.realm_year_id = :realmYearId and rpy.id = :realmYearId order by PLAN_TYPE, planDescr

SELECT DISTINCT nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_ID from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = rpyp.BENEFIT_PLAN and rbpm.REALM_ID = rpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt ), rpyp.BENEFIT_PLAN) benefit_plan, case rpyp.plan_type when ('10') then '10' when ('11') then '11' when ('1D') then '11' when ('14') then '14' when ('1V') then '14' end AS plan_type, nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_DESCR from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = rpyp.BENEFIT_PLAN and rbpm.REALM_ID = rpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt ), bpv.descr) descr from xbss_realm_plyr_plan rpyp, xbss_realm_plan_year rpy, xbss_benef_plan_mv bpv where rpyp.BENEFIT_PLAN = bpv.BENEFIT_PLAN and rpyp.plan_type in ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') and bpv.plan_type in ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') and rpy.id = :realmYearId and rpyp.realm_year_id = :realmYearId and bpv.EFFDT = ( select max(EFFDT) from xbss_benef_plan_mv bpv1 where bpv1.BENEFIT_PLAN = bpv.BENEFIT_PLAN and bpv1.PLAN_TYPE = bpv.PLAN_TYPE and bpv1.EFFDT <= rpy.plan_year_end ) order by plan_type, descr

select distinct nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_ID from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm, xbss_realm_plan_year oldRpy where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = vpm.OLDPLANID and rbpm.REALM_ID = oldRpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = oldRpy.OE_QUARTER and oldRpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt and oldRpy.id = :prevRealmPlanYearId ), vpm.OLDPLANID) current_plan, nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_ID from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = vpm.newplanid and rbpm.REALM_ID = rpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt ), bpv.BENEFIT_PLAN) mapping_plan, nvl(( select rbpm.BASE_PLAN_DESCR from xbss_regional_base_plan_mapping rbpm where rbpm.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID = vpm.newplanid and rbpm.REALM_ID = rpy.REALM_ID and rbpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_END between rbpm.effdt and rbpm.enddt ), bpv.descr) descr, case bpv.plan_type when ('10') then '10' when ('11') then '11' when ('1D') then '11' when ('14') then '14' when ('1V') then '14' end AS plan_type from xbss_realm_vendor_plan_mapping vpm, xbss_realm_plan_year rpy, xbss_benef_plan_mv bpv where rpy.id = :realmPlanYearId and rpy.PLAN_YEAR_START between vpm.EFFDT and vpm.ENDDT and bpv.plan_type in ('10', '11', '14', '1D', '1V') and vpm.OE_QUARTER = rpy.OE_QUARTER and vpm.NEWPLANID = bpv.BENEFIT_PLAN and vpm.MAPPING_TYPE != 'S' and bpv.EFFDT = ( select max(EFFDT) from xbss_benef_plan_mv bpv1, xbss_realm_plan_year rpy1 where bpv1.BENEFIT_PLAN = vpm.newplanid and bpv1.PLAN_TYPE = vpm.PLANTYPE and rpy1.id = :realmPlanYearId and bpv1.EFFDT <= rpy1.plan_year_end ) order by plan_type, descr

WITH PROSPECT_EXCHANGE AS ( SELECT XCOMP.CODE , XCOMP.ID COMPANY_ID , XCOMP.REALM_YEAR_ID , XRPY.REALM_ID , XRPY.OE_QUARTER , XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START , XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END FROM XBSS_COMPANY XCOMP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR XRPY WHERE XCOMP.CODE = :companyCode AND XRPY.ID = XCOMP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START = ( SELECT MAX(PLAN_YEAR_START) FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR R1 WHERE R1.ID IN ( SELECT REALM_YEAR_ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY WHERE CODE = XCOMP.CODE ) AND R1.PLAN_YEAR_START <= :benStartDt and R1.REALM_ID=3)
UNION
SELECT XCOMP.CODE , XCOMP.ID COMPANY_ID , XCOMP.REALM_YEAR_ID , XRPY.REALM_ID , XRPY.OE_QUARTER , XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START , XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END FROM XBSS_COMPANY XCOMP , XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR XRPY WHERE XCOMP.CODE = :companyCode AND XRPY.ID = XCOMP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND :benStartDt between XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START and XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END and XRPY.REALM_ID!=3
), EXCHANGE_PORTFOLIOS AS ( SELECT PE.CODE , PE.REALM_ID , PE.REALM_YEAR_ID , XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID , PEF.DESCR , XRP.PLAN_TYPE , XRP.RULE , XRP.PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID FROM PROSPECT_EXCHANGE PE , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_RULES XRPYR , XBSS_PORTFOLIO XP , XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE XRP.OE_QUARTER = PE.OE_QUARTER AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XRP.PRIMARY_PORTFOLIO = 1 AND XRPYR.OE_QUARTER = PE.OE_QUARTER AND XRPYR.KEY = 'PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG' AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRPYR.EFFDT AND XRPYR.ENDDT AND XP.ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.ID AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', XRPYR.VALUE ) AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= PE.PLAN_YEAR_START ) AND ( XRP.RESTRICTION IS NULL OR ( XRP.RESTRICTION = 'Z' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_AVAILABILITY XPA WHERE XPA.PORTFOLIO_ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XPA.EFFDT AND XPA.ENDDT AND XPA.POSTAL_CD = :zipCode AND XPA.STATE = :state ) ) ) AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :state OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = PE.OE_QUARTER AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', XRPYR.VALUE ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :state ) ) ) ) SELECT PE.CODE , PE.COMPANY_ID , PE.REALM_ID , PE.REALM_YEAR_ID , EXP.PORTFOLIO_ID , EXP.DESCR , EXP.PLAN_TYPE , EXP.RULE , EXP.PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM XBSS_STRATEGY ST WHERE ST.COMPANY_ID = PE.COMPANY_ID ) THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END STRATEGY_CREATED FROM PROSPECT_EXCHANGE PE , EXCHANGE_PORTFOLIOS EXP WHERE EXP.CODE(+) = PE.CODE AND EXP.REALM_YEAR_ID(+) = PE.REALM_YEAR_ID

SELECT RPY.REALM_ID, BANDS.EFFECTIVE_DT, BANDS.COMPANY_ID, LISTAGG(COALESCE(BANDS.BAND_CODE_TYPE, '-'), ';') WITHIN GROUP( ORDER BY COMPANY_ID, EFFECTIVE_DT, BAND_CODE_TYPE ) "BAND_CODE_TYPE", LISTAGG(COALESCE(BANDS.BAND_CODE_VAL, '-'), ';') WITHIN GROUP( ORDER BY COMPANY_ID, EFFECTIVE_DT, BAND_CODE_TYPE ) "BAND_CODE_VAL" FROM XBSS_BAND_CODES BANDS JOIN XBSS_COMPANY COMPANY ON BANDS.COMPANY_ID = COMPANY.ID JOIN XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY ON COMPANY.REALM_YEAR_ID = RPY.ID WHERE BANDS.COMPANY_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY WHERE CODE IN ( :companyCode ) ) AND BANDS.EFFECTIVE_DT >= ( SELECT MAX(EFFECTIVE_DT) FROM XBSS_BAND_CODES BANDS1 WHERE BANDS1.EFFECTIVE_DT <= :benStartDt AND BANDS1.COMPANY_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM XBSS_COMPANY company1 WHERE company1.CODE IN ( :companyCode ) AND company1.REALM_YEAR_ID in (select id from XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR where realm_id = RPY.realm_id) ) ) GROUP BY REALM_ID, COMPANY_ID, EFFECTIVE_DT ORDER BY REALM_ID, EFFECTIVE_DT ASC

select xbc.COMPANY_ID, xbc.BAND_CODE_TYPE, xbc.BAND_CODE_VAL from XBSS_BAND_CODES xbc where xbc.COMPANY_ID = :companyId AND xbc.effective_dt = ( select max(xbc1.effective_dt) from XBSS_BAND_CODES xbc1 where xbc1.COMPANY_ID = xbc.COMPANY_ID AND xbc1.effective_dt <= :effDate )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT xbc.effective_dt FROM xbss_band_codes xbc WHERE xbc.company_id IN ( SELECT xc.id FROM xbss_company xc, xbss_realm_plan_year xrpy WHERE xc.code = :companyCode AND xc.realm_year_id = xrpy.id AND xrpy.realm_id = :realmId ) AND xbc.effective_dt = ( SELECT MAX(xbc1.effective_dt) FROM xbss_band_codes xbc1 WHERE xbc1.company_id = xbc.company_id AND xbc1.effective_dt <= sysdate ) ORDER BY xbc.effective_dt DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

WITH FILTERED_PLAN_TYPES AS ( SELECT '10' AS PLAN_TYPE FROM DUAL UNION SELECT CASE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT XSGP.PLAN_TYPE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11', '1D')) WHEN 0 THEN '11' WHEN 1 THEN (SELECT DISTINCT XSGP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11', '1D')) ELSE CASE (SELECT DISTINCT PA.BENEFIT_TYPE FROM XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT PA WHERE PA.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PA.BENEFIT_TYPE IN ('1D')) WHEN '1D' THEN '1D' ELSE '11' END END AS PLAN_TYPE FROM DUAL UNION SELECT CASE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT XSGP.PLAN_TYPE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14', '1V')) WHEN 0 THEN '14' WHEN 1 THEN (SELECT DISTINCT XSGP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ('14', '1V')) ELSE CASE (SELECT DISTINCT PA.BENEFIT_TYPE FROM XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT PA WHERE PA.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PA.BENEFIT_TYPE IN ('1V')) WHEN '1V' THEN '1V' ELSE '14' END END AS PLAN_TYPE FROM DUAL ), APPENDIX_PLANS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XSGP.PLAN_TYPE, COALESCE(XRRP1.SUB_REGION, XRRP1.REGION) AS REGION FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_RL_REGION_PLAN1 XRRP1 WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRRP1.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = XRPP.ID AND ( ( XRRP1.REGION IN ( :regions ) AND ( XRRP1.SUB_REGION IN ( :regions ) OR XRRP1.SUB_REGION IS NULL OR 0 = :filterSubregions ) ) OR XRRP1.SUB_REGION IN ( :regions ) ) AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :mdPlanTypes ) UNION SELECT DISTINCT XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XSGP.PLAN_TYPE, '' AS REGION FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE IN ( :visionPlanTypes ) ), RESOLVED_PLANS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT AP.PLAN_TYPE, XRBP.BASE_PLAN_ID AS BENEFIT_PLAN, XRBP.BASE_PLAN_DESCR AS DESCR, AP.REGION AS REGION FROM APPENDIX_PLANS AP JOIN XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBP ON AP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRBP.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AND AP.PLAN_TYPE = XRBP.PLANTYPE JOIN XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY ON RPY.OE_QUARTER = XRBP.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XRBP.EFFDT AND XRBP.ENDDT AND RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId WHERE :ratesFlag = 'NATIONAL'
UNION
-- REGIONAL: pass through as-is (current behavior) SELECT AP.PLAN_TYPE, AP.BENEFIT_PLAN, 'PLAN_NAME' AS DESCR, AP.REGION FROM APPENDIX_PLANS AP WHERE :ratesFlag != 'NATIONAL' ) SELECT UNEP.PLAN_TYPE, UNEP.BENEFIT_PLAN, CASE WHEN :ratesFlag = 'NATIONAL' THEN UNEP.DESCR ELSE XBPM.DESCR END AS DESCR, UNEP.REGION FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV XBPM, RESOLVED_PLANS UNEP, FILTERED_PLAN_TYPES FPT WHERE XBPM.BENEFIT_PLAN = UNEP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND UNEP.PLAN_TYPE = FPT.PLAN_TYPE AND XBPM.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(XBPM2.EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV XBPM2 WHERE XBPM2.PLAN_TYPE = XBPM.PLAN_TYPE AND XBPM2.BENEFIT_PLAN = XBPM.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XBPM2.EFFDT <= :effDate ) ORDER BY UNEP.PLAN_TYPE, UNEP.REGION

WITH STRATEGY_GROUP AS ( SELECT ST.ID STRATEGY_ID , SGP.GROUP_ID , SGP.HEADCOUNT , GP.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , GP.GROUP_TYPE , GP.DESCR GROUP_NAME FROM XBSS_STRATEGY ST , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SGP , XBSS_GROUP GP WHERE ST.ID = :strategyId AND SGP.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID AND SGP.STATUS = 'A' AND GP.ID = SGP.GROUP_ID ), LIFE_PLANS AS ( SELECT PLANS.PLAN_TYPE , PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN , PLAN_VW.DESCR , null BUNDLE_DISPLAY_SEQ , DSP.DISPLAY_SEQ PLAN_DISPLAY_SEQ FROM XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_PLAN_DISP_SEQ DSP ON DSP.REALM_YEAR_ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID AND DSP.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND DSP.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN , XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PLAN_VW WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '23' ) AND PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE = PLANS.PLAN_TYPE AND PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PLAN_VW.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV PV1 WHERE PV1.PLAN_TYPE = PLAN_VW.PLAN_TYPE AND PV1.BENEFIT_PLAN = PLAN_VW.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PV1.EFFDT <= ( SELECT LEAST(GREATEST(RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, TRUNC(SYSDATE)), RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END) AS EFFDT FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE RPY.ID = PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID ) ) ), DISABILITY_PLANS AS ( SELECT BND.ID BUNDLE_ID , BND.DESCR BUNDLE_DESCR , BND.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE , PLN.PLAN_TYPE , PLN.BENEFIT_PLAN , PLN.DESCR PLAN_DESCR , PLN.EMPLOYEE_PAID , PLN.SHORT_DESCR , BND.DISPLAY_SEQ BUNDLE_DISPLAY_SEQ , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY BND.ID ORDER BY PLN.PLAN_TYPE, PLN.DESCR, CASE WHEN PLN.SHORT_DESCR LIKE '%SDI%' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ) PLAN_DISPLAY_SEQ
FROM XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION BND , XBSS_DISABILITY_OPTION_PLANS PLN WHERE BND.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND PLN.DISABILITY_OPTION_ID = BND.ID ) SELECT PSL.ID PSL_ID , SG.STRATEGY_ID , SG.GROUP_ID , NULL BUNDLE_ID , ' ' BUNDLE_DESCR , LF.PLAN_TYPE , LF.BENEFIT_PLAN , LF.DESCR PLAN_DESCR , SG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , SG.GROUP_NAME , 0 EMPLOYEE_PAID , 'LIFE' SHORT_DESCR , LF.BUNDLE_DISPLAY_SEQ , LF.PLAN_DISPLAY_SEQ FROM STRATEGY_GROUP SG , LIFE_PLANS LF , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PSL WHERE PSL.STRATEGY_ID(+) = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND PSL.GROUP_ID(+) = SG.GROUP_ID AND PSL.PLAN_TYPE(+) = LF.PLAN_TYPE AND PSL.BENEFIT_PLAN(+) = LF.BENEFIT_PLAN
UNION
SELECT PSL.ID PLAN_SELECT_ID , SG.STRATEGY_ID , SG.GROUP_ID , DI.BUNDLE_ID , DI.BUNDLE_DESCR , DI.PLAN_TYPE , DI.BENEFIT_PLAN , DI.PLAN_DESCR , SG.BENEFIT_PROGRAM , SG.GROUP_NAME , DI.EMPLOYEE_PAID , DI.SHORT_DESCR , DI.BUNDLE_DISPLAY_SEQ , DI.PLAN_DISPLAY_SEQ FROM STRATEGY_GROUP SG , DISABILITY_PLANS DI , XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT PSL WHERE DI.OFFERED_GROUP_TYPE IN ( 'ALL', SG.GROUP_TYPE ) AND PSL.STRATEGY_ID(+) = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND PSL.GROUP_ID(+) = SG.GROUP_ID AND PSL.PLAN_TYPE(+) = DI.PLAN_TYPE AND PSL.BENEFIT_PLAN(+) = DI.BENEFIT_PLAN
ORDER BY STRATEGY_ID, GROUP_ID, BUNDLE_DISPLAY_SEQ, PLAN_DISPLAY_SEQ, PLAN_DESCR

WITH STRAT_DEFAULT_PLAN AS ( SELECT XSD.PORTFOLIO_ID, XSD.PLAN_TYPE, XSD.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN, XRR.HQ_REGION FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_DEFAULT_PLAN XSD, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRR WHERE XSD.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND ( (:bundleId IS NOT NULL AND XSD.BUNDLE_ID = :bundleId AND XSD.PLAN_TYPE='10' ) OR (:bundleId IS NULL AND XSD.BUNDLE_ID IS NULL) OR (XSD.PLAN_TYPE IN ('11','14','1D','1V')) ) AND XRR.OE_QUARTER = XSD.OE_QUARTER AND TO_DATE(:effDate) BETWEEN XRR.EFFDT AND XRR.ENDDT AND XRR.PORTFOLIO_ID = XSD.PORTFOLIO_ID AND XRR.PLAN_TYPE = XSD.PLAN_TYPE AND ( XRR.HQ_REGION = :state OR ( XRR.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = XRR.OE_QUARTER AND TO_DATE(:effDate) BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :state ) ) ) ), ALL_REGIONS_PLANS AS ( SELECT PLAN_TYPE, BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN BENEFIT_PLAN FROM STRAT_DEFAULT_PLAN SD UNION SELECT PLANTYPE, REGIONAL_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBPM WHERE XRBPM.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND TO_DATE(:effDate) BETWEEN XRBPM.EFFDT AND XRBPM.ENDDT AND XRBPM.BASE_PLAN_ID IN ( SELECT BASE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XR2 WHERE XR2.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID IN ( SELECT BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN BENEFIT_PLAN FROM STRAT_DEFAULT_PLAN SD ) AND XR2.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND TO_DATE(:effDate) BETWEEN XR2.EFFDT AND XR2.ENDDT ) ) SELECT XRPP.PLAN_TYPE, XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN, XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM ALL_REGIONS_PLANS AP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP WHERE XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = AP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ( XRPP.SITUS = :situs OR XRPP.SITUS IS NULL ) UNION SELECT ER.EMPLOYEE_PAID_PLAN_TYPE, ER.EMPLOYEE_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN, XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM ALL_REGIONS_PLANS AP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_ER_EE_PLANS_MAPPING ER WHERE XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = AP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND ( XRPP.SITUS = :situs OR XRPP.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ER.REALM_YEAR_ID = XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND ER.EMPLOYER_PAID_PLAN_TYPE = XRPP.PLAN_TYPE AND ER.EMPLOYER_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN

WITH CURRENT_HC AS (SELECT ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , epa.BENEFIT_TYPE , epa.BENEFIT_PLAN , epa.PORTFOLIO_ID , epa.COVRG_CD AS COVRG_CD_MAPPED , COUNT(DISTINCT epa.EMPLID) AS ENROLLED_COUNT , SUM(rpp.HDHP) AS HSA_HC , 'CUSTOM' as SELECTION_TYPE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY ST , XBSS_COMPANY COMP , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESGV , XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT EPA , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE ST.ID = :strategyId AND epa.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID AND ESGV.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID AND ESGV.EMPLID = EPA.EMPLID AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = EPA.BENEFIT_PLAN AND ST.COMPANY_ID = COMP.ID AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = COMP.REALM_YEAR_ID GROUP BY ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EPA.BENEFIT_TYPE , EPA.BENEFIT_PLAN , EPA.PORTFOLIO_ID , EPA.COVRG_CD , RPP.HDHP)
SELECT * FROM CURRENT_HC currHC
UNION SELECT ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , edpa.PLAN_TYPE , edpa.BENEFIT_PLAN , edpa.PORTFOLIO_ID , edpa.COVRG_CD AS COVRG_CD_MAPPED , COUNT(DISTINCT edpa.EMPLID) AS ENROLLED_COUNT , SUM(rpp.HDHP) AS HSA_HC , 'DEFAULT' AS SELECTION_TYPE FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESGV , XBSS_COMPANY COMP , XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT EDPA , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE ESGV.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND ESGV.EMPLID = EDPA.EMPLID AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = edpa.BENEFIT_PLAN AND COMP.ID = EDPA.COMPANY_ID AND ESGV.COMPANY_ID = COMP.ID AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = COMP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND ((edpa.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND edpa.PORTFOLIO_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PORTFOLIO_ID from CURRENT_HC where BENEFIT_TYPE ='10')) OR edpa.PLAN_TYPE not in (SELECT DISTINCT PLAN_TYPE from XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND PLAN_TYPE IN ('11', '14', '1D', '1V', '10'))) GROUP BY ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EDPA.PLAN_TYPE , EDPA.BENEFIT_PLAN , EDPA.PORTFOLIO_ID , EDPA.COVRG_CD , RPP.HDHP

SELECT ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , epa.BENEFIT_TYPE , epa.BENEFIT_PLAN , epa.PORTFOLIO_ID , epa.COVRG_CD AS COVRG_CD_MAPPED , COUNT(DISTINCT epa.EMPLID) AS ENROLLED_COUNT , SUM(rpp.HDHP) AS HSA_HC , 'CUSTOM' as SELECTION_TYPE FROM XBSS_STRATEGY ST , XBSS_COMPANY COMP , XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW ESGV , XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT EPA , XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN RPP WHERE ST.ID = :strategyId AND epa.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID AND ESGV.STRATEGY_ID = ST.ID AND ESGV.EMPLID = EPA.EMPLID AND RPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = EPA.BENEFIT_PLAN AND ST.COMPANY_ID = COMP.ID AND RPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = COMP.REALM_YEAR_ID GROUP BY ESGV.FUTURE_BENEFIT_PROGRAM , EPA.BENEFIT_TYPE , EPA.BENEFIT_PLAN , EPA.PORTFOLIO_ID , EPA.COVRG_CD , RPP.HDHP

with portfolio_details as ( select strategy.company_id company_id, listagg (distinct case when strategy.type = 'recommended' then strategy.id end , ',') default_strategy_ids, listagg (distinct strategy.id , ',') all_strategy_ids, listagg (distinct case when strategy.type = 'recommended' then planyear.portfolio_id end , ',') default_strategy_ids_portfolio_ids, listagg (distinct planyear.realm_year_id , ',') realm_year_id from xbss_strategy strategy left join xbss_strategy_group_planselect planselect on strategy.id = planselect.strategy_id left join xbss_realm_plyr_plan planyear on planselect.benefit_plan = planyear.benefit_plan where planyear.realm_year_id in (select realm_year_id from xbss_company where id in (:companyIds)) and strategy.id in (select id from xbss_strategy where company_id in (:companyIds) ) and planselect.plan_type = '10' group by strategy.company_id ) select pd.*, ( select realm_id from xbss_realm_plan_year where id = pd.realm_year_id ) realm_id from portfolio_details pd
delete from xbss_ee_plan_assignment where strategy_id in (:strategyIds)
delete from xbss_ee_default_plan_assignment where company_id = :companyId

INSERT INTO XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT ( STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, BENEFIT_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID ) WITH PRIMARY_PLANS ( STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID ) AS ( SELECT DISTINCT :STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, XEDPA1.BENEFIT_PLAN, XEDPA1.PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT XEDPA1, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XEDPA1.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XEDPA1.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :PRM_PORTFOLIO_IDS ) AND XEDPA1.COMPANY_ID = :COMPANY_ID AND XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XEDPA1.BENEFIT_PLAN ), ALTERNATE_PLANS ( STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID ) AS ( SELECT DISTINCT :STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, XEDPA1.BENEFIT_PLAN, XEDPA1.PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT XEDPA1, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP WHERE XEDPA1.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XEDPA1.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :ALT_PORTFOLIO_IDS ) AND XEDPA1.COMPANY_ID = :COMPANY_ID AND XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XEDPA1.BENEFIT_PLAN ) SELECT STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID FROM PRIMARY_PLANS UNION SELECT STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID FROM ALTERNATE_PLANS ALT WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM PRIMARY_PLANS PRI WHERE PRI.STRATEGY_ID = ALT.STRATEGY_ID AND PRI.EMPLID = ALT.EMPLID AND PRI.PLAN_TYPE = ALT.PLAN_TYPE ) UNION SELECT :STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, PLAN_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT XEDPA WHERE XEDPA.PLAN_TYPE IN ( '11', '14' ) AND XEDPA.COMPANY_ID = :COMPANY_ID

INSERT INTO XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT ( STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, BENEFIT_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID ) SELECT DISTINCT XSGPS.STRATEGY_ID, XEDPA.EMPLID, XEDPA.BENEFIT_PLAN, XEDPA.PLAN_TYPE, XEDPA.COVRG_CD, XEDPA.PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT XEDPA, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGPS, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XESGVW, XBSS_STRATEGY XS WHERE XEDPA.PLAN_TYPE = XSGPS.PLAN_TYPE AND XEDPA.BENEFIT_PLAN = XSGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XSGPS.STRATEGY_ID = XESGVW.STRATEGY_ID AND XSGPS.GROUP_ID = XESGVW.FUTURE_GROUP_ID AND XEDPA.EMPLID = XESGVW.EMPLID AND XEDPA.COMPANY_ID = XS.COMPANY_ID AND XS.ID = XESGVW.STRATEGY_ID AND XSGPS.PLAN_TYPE in (:DEN_VIS_BEN_TYPE_CODES) AND (XESGVW.EMPLID in (:EMPLIDS) OR 1=:IGNORE_EMPL_ID) AND (XESGVW.STRATEGY_ID in (:STRATEGY_IDS) OR 1=:IGNORE_STRATEGY_ID) AND (XESGVW.FUTURE_GROUP_ID in (:GROUP_IDS) OR 1=:IGNORE_GROUP_ID) UNION SELECT XSGPS.STRATEGY_ID AS STRATEGY_ID, XEDPA.EMPLID AS EMPLID, XEDPA.BENEFIT_PLAN AS BENEFIT_PLAN, XEDPA.PLAN_TYPE AS PLAN_TYPE, XEDPA.COVRG_CD AS COVRG_CD, XEDPA.PORTFOLIO_ID AS PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT XEDPA, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGPS, XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XESGVW, XBSS_STRATEGY XS WHERE XEDPA.PLAN_TYPE = XSGPS.PLAN_TYPE AND XSGPS.STRATEGY_ID = XESGVW.STRATEGY_ID AND XSGPS.GROUP_ID = XESGVW.FUTURE_GROUP_ID AND XEDPA.EMPLID = XESGVW.EMPLID AND XSGPS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:MED_BEN_TYPE_CODE) AND XSGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN = XEDPA.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XEDPA.COMPANY_ID = XS.COMPANY_ID AND XS.ID = XESGVW.STRATEGY_ID AND (XESGVW.EMPLID IN (:EMPLIDS) OR 1=:IGNORE_EMPL_ID) AND (XESGVW.STRATEGY_ID IN (:STRATEGY_IDS) OR 1=:IGNORE_STRATEGY_ID) AND (XESGVW.FUTURE_GROUP_ID IN (:GROUP_IDS) OR 1=:IGNORE_GROUP_ID) AND ( XEDPA.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PRIMARY_MED_PORTFOLIO) OR ( XEDPA.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:ALTERNATE_MED_PORTFOLIO) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM XBSS_EE_DEFAULT_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT XEDPA1 WHERE XEDPA1.PLAN_TYPE = XEDPA.PLAN_TYPE AND XEDPA1.EMPLID = XEDPA.EMPLID AND XEDPA1.PORTFOLIO_ID IN (:PRIMARY_MED_PORTFOLIO) ) ) ) ORDER BY PLAN_TYPE

INSERT INTO XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT ( STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, BENEFIT_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID ) SELECT :TO_STRATEGY_ID, EMPLID, BENEFIT_PLAN, BENEFIT_TYPE, COVRG_CD, PORTFOLIO_ID FROM XBSS_EE_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT WHERE STRATEGY_ID = :FROM_STRATEGY_ID

select company.id company_id, listagg (distinct strategy.id , ',') all_strategy_ids, listagg (distinct company.realm_year_id , ',') realm_year_id from xbss_company company left join xbss_strategy strategy on company.id = strategy.company_id where company.code = :companyCode group by company.id

SELECT XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_EMPL_STRATEGY_GROUP_VW XSGV, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLAN1 XRR ON XRPP.ID = XRR.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID WHERE XSGV.EMPLID = :EMPLID AND XSGV.STRATEGY_ID = :STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = XSGV.STRATEGY_ID AND XSGP.GROUP_ID = XSGV.FUTURE_GROUP_ID AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = :BENEFIT_TYPE AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_PLAN_YEAR_ID AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE = XRPP.PLAN_TYPE AND XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND ( XRR.REGION IS NULL OR XRR.REGION = :REGION )
select * from xbss_strategy_funding_model where strategy_id IN (:strategyIds)

WITH PORTFOLIOS AS ( SELECT XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID , XRP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP WHERE RPY.ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :HQ_REGION OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = XRP.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', :pickChooseFlag ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :HQ_REGION ) ) ) AND ( ( XRP.RULE = 'Restricted:T' AND XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :PRIM_PORTFOLIO ) ) OR XRP.RULE != 'Restricted:T' OR XRP.RULE IS NULL ) AND ( XRP.PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :PRIM_PORTFOLIO ) OR XRP.PARENT_PORTFOLIO_ID IS NULL ) ), APPLICABLE_PLANS AS ( SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE FROM PORTFOLIOS XP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLAN1 REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = XP.PLAN_TYPE AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :outOfRegionPlans ) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = 'TX' OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGIONS.REGION IN ( :regions ) OR REGIONS.REGION IS NULL ) AND ( PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE IS NULL OR PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 ) ) SELECT DISTINCT XRBP.PLANTYPE ,XRBP.OE_QUARTER , XRBP.BASE_PLAN_ID , XRBP.BASE_PLAN_DESCR FROM XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBP, APPLICABLE_PLANS AP, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY WHERE AP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRBP.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AND RPY.OE_QUARTER = XRBP.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XRBP.EFFDT AND XRBP.ENDDT AND RPY.ID = :REALM_YEAR_ID AND XRBP.PLANTYPE IN ( :planTypes )

SELECT DISTINCT XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID, XRP.PRIMARY_PORTFOLIO FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT XSGP, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN XRPP, XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR XRPY, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_RULES XRPYR WHERE XSGP.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND XSGP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRPP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND XRPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRPP.REALM_YEAR_ID = XRPY.id AND XSGP.PLAN_TYPE in ( '10' ) AND XRPP.PLAN_TYPE = XSGP.PLAN_TYPE AND XRPP.PORTFOLIO_ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND XRPYR.OE_QUARTER = XRPY.OE_QUARTER AND XRPYR.EFFDT <= XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START AND XRPYR.ENDDT >= XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END AND XRPYR.KEY = 'PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG' AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = XRPY.OE_QUARTER AND XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE = XSGP.PLAN_TYPE AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', TO_CHAR( XRPYR.VALUE ) ) AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :state OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = XRP.OE_QUARTER AND XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', TO_CHAR( XRPYR.VALUE ) ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :state ) ) )

SELECT PE.ID AS REALM_PLAN_YEAR, XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID, PEF.DESCR, XRP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PE, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_RULES XRPYR, XBSS_PORTFOLIO XP, XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE PE.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = PE.OE_QUARTER AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE = '10' AND XRP.PRIMARY_PORTFOLIO = 1 AND XRPYR.OE_QUARTER = PE.OE_QUARTER AND XRPYR.KEY = 'PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG' AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRPYR.EFFDT AND XRPYR.ENDDT AND XP.ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.ID AND XRP.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', XRPYR.VALUE ) AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= PE.PLAN_YEAR_START ) AND ( XRP.RESTRICTION IS NULL OR ( XRP.RESTRICTION = 'Z' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_AVAILABILITY XPA WHERE XPA.PORTFOLIO_ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XPA.EFFDT AND XPA.ENDDT AND XPA.POSTAL_CD = :zipCode AND XPA.STATE = :state ) ) ) AND ( XRP.HQ_REGION = :state OR ( XRP.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO T2 WHERE T2.OE_QUARTER = XRP.OE_QUARTER AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN T2.EFFDT AND T2.ENDDT AND T2.PICK_CHOOSE_FLAG IN ( ' ', XRPYR.VALUE ) AND T2.HQ_REGION = :state ) ) )

SELECT DISTINCT PE.ID AS REALM_PLAN_YEAR, XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID, PEF.DESCR, XRP.PLAN_TYPE FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR PE, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP, XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT PEF WHERE PE.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = PE.OE_QUARTER AND PE.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE = :planType AND PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID = XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PEF.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(EFFDT) FROM XBSS_PORTFOLIO_EFFDT P1 WHERE P1.PORTFOLIO_ID = PEF.PORTFOLIO_ID AND P1.EFFDT <= PE.PLAN_YEAR_START )

WITH PORTFOLIOS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID, XRP.PLAN_TYPE, RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END, RPY.OE_QUARTER FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND RPY.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :portfolioIds ) AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE = :planType ), BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT XBP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_PLANS XBP, PORTFOLIOS XP WHERE XBP.BUNDLE_ID = :bundleId AND XP.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XBP.EFFDT AND XBP.ENDDT AND XBP.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND XBP.PLAN_TYPE = XP.PLAN_TYPE AND XBP.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter ), APPLICABLE_PLANS AS ( SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE, XP.PLAN_YEAR_END, XP.OE_QUARTER FROM PORTFOLIOS XP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLAN1 REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = XP.PLAN_TYPE AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :outOfRegionPlans ) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = 'TX' OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGIONS.REGION IN ( :regions ) OR REGIONS.REGION IS NULL ) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :bundleId IS NOT NULL) ) SELECT DISTINCT XRBP.PLANTYPE, XRBP.OE_QUARTER, XRBP.BASE_PLAN_ID, XRBP.BASE_PLAN_DESCR FROM XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBP, APPLICABLE_PLANS AP WHERE AP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRBP.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AND AP.OE_QUARTER = XRBP.OE_QUARTER AND AP.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XRBP.EFFDT AND XRBP.ENDDT AND ( XRBP.PLANTYPE IN ( '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) OR ( :bundleId IS NULL OR XRBP.BASE_PLAN_ID IN ( SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS ) ) )

WITH PORTFOLIOS AS ( SELECT DISTINCT XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID, XRP.PLAN_TYPE, RPY.PLAN_YEAR_END, RPY.OE_QUARTER FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO XRP WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND RPY.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter AND XRP.PORTFOLIO_ID IN ( :portfolioIds ) AND XRP.PLAN_TYPE = :planType ), BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS AS ( SELECT BQP.BASE_BENEFIT_PLAN AS BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER_PLAN BQP, XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER BQ, PORTFOLIOS XP WHERE BQ.BUNDLE_ID = :bundleId AND BQP.BUNDLE_QUARTER_ID = BQ.ID AND XP.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN BQP.EFFDT AND BQP.ENDDT AND XP.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN BQ.EFFDT AND BQ.ENDDT AND BQP.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND BQP.PLAN_TYPE = XP.PLAN_TYPE AND BQ.OE_QUARTER = :oeQuarter ), APPLICABLE_PLANS AS ( SELECT PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN, PLANS.PLAN_TYPE, XP.PLAN_YEAR_END, XP.OE_QUARTER FROM PORTFOLIOS XP, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PLANS LEFT JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLAN1 REGIONS ON REGIONS.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID = PLANS.ID WHERE PLANS.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND PLANS.PORTFOLIO_ID = XP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND PLANS.PLAN_TYPE = XP.PLAN_TYPE AND PLANS.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN ( :outOfRegionPlans ) AND ( PLANS.SITUS = 'TX' OR PLANS.SITUS IS NULL ) AND ( REGIONS.REGION IN ( :regions ) OR REGIONS.REGION IS NULL ) AND (PLANS.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0 OR :bundleId IS NOT NULL) ) SELECT DISTINCT XRBP.PLANTYPE, XRBP.OE_QUARTER, XRBP.BASE_PLAN_ID, XRBP.BASE_PLAN_DESCR FROM XBSS_REGIONAL_BASE_PLAN_MAPPING XRBP, APPLICABLE_PLANS AP WHERE AP.BENEFIT_PLAN = XRBP.REGIONAL_PLAN_ID AND AP.OE_QUARTER = XRBP.OE_QUARTER AND AP.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XRBP.EFFDT AND XRBP.ENDDT AND ( XRBP.PLANTYPE IN ( '11', '14', '1D', '1V' ) OR ( :bundleId IS NULL OR XRBP.BASE_PLAN_ID IN ( SELECT BUNDLE_PLAN_ID FROM BUNDLE_MEDICAL_PLANS ) ) )

SELECT emplid, CASE WHEN plan_type IN ( '1D', '11' ) THEN '11' WHEN plan_type IN ( '1V', '14' ) THEN '14' WHEN plan_type IN ( '10' ) THEN '10' END AS plan_type FROM xbss_ee_default_plan_assignment WHERE emplid IN ( :emplIds ) AND company_id IN ( :companyId ) MINUS SELECT emplid, CASE WHEN benefit_type IN ( '1D', '11' ) THEN '11' WHEN benefit_type IN ( '1V', '14' ) THEN '14' WHEN benefit_type IN ( '10' ) THEN '10' END AS plan_type FROM xbss_ee_plan_assignment WHERE emplid IN ( :emplIds ) AND STRATEGY_ID IN ( :strategyId )

MERGE INTO XBSS_CONTRIBUTION TGT USING ( SELECT ? AS PLAN_SELECTION_ID , ? AS COVERAGE_LEVEL , ? AS ER_CONTRIB_PCT , ? AS HEADCOUNT , ? AS BN_EMPL_RATE , ? AS BN_EMPLR_RATE , ? AS OVERRIDE_TYPE , ? AS HSA_HEADCOUNT FROM DUAL ) SRC
ON ( TGT.PLAN_SELECTION_ID = SRC.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND TGT.COVERAGE_LEVEL = SRC.COVERAGE_LEVEL )
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( TGT.ID, TGT.PLAN_SELECTION_ID, TGT.COVERAGE_LEVEL, TGT.ER_CONTRIB_PCT, TGT.HEADCOUNT , TGT.BN_EMPL_RATE, TGT.BN_EMPLR_RATE, TGT.OVERRIDE_TYPE, TGT.HSA_HEADCOUNT) VALUES (XBSS_CONTRIB_SEQ.NEXTVAL, SRC.PLAN_SELECTION_ID, SRC.COVERAGE_LEVEL, SRC.ER_CONTRIB_PCT, SRC.HEADCOUNT , SRC.BN_EMPL_RATE, SRC.BN_EMPLR_RATE, SRC.OVERRIDE_TYPE, SRC.HSA_HEADCOUNT )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TGT.ER_CONTRIB_PCT = SRC.ER_CONTRIB_PCT , TGT.HEADCOUNT = SRC.HEADCOUNT , TGT.BN_EMPL_RATE = SRC.BN_EMPL_RATE , TGT.BN_EMPLR_RATE = SRC.BN_EMPLR_RATE , TGT.OVERRIDE_TYPE = SRC.OVERRIDE_TYPE , TGT.HSA_HEADCOUNT = SRC.HSA_HEADCOUNT

WITH portfolios AS ( SELECT xrp.portfolio_id, xrp.plan_type FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY , xbss_rl_portfolio xrp WHERE RPY.ID = :realm_plan_year_id AND XRP.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND TO_DATE( :realm_plan_year_effdt ) BETWEEN XRP.EFFDT AND XRP.ENDDT AND xrp.pick_choose_flag IN ( ' ', :pick_choose_flag ) AND ( xrp.hq_region = :hq_region OR ( xrp.hq_region = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM xbss_rl_portfolio t2 WHERE t2.OE_QUARTER = XRP.OE_QUARTER AND TO_DATE( :realm_plan_year_effdt ) BETWEEN t2.EFFDT AND t2.ENDDT AND t2.pick_choose_flag IN ( ' ', :pick_choose_flag ) AND t2.hq_region = :hq_region ) ) ) AND ( ( xrp.rule = 'Restricted:T' AND xrp.portfolio_id IN ( :prim_portfolio ) ) OR xrp.rule != 'Restricted:T' OR xrp.rule IS NULL ) AND ( xrp.parent_portfolio_id IN ( :prim_portfolio ) OR xrp.parent_portfolio_id IS NULL ) ), applicable_plans AS ( SELECT plans.benefit_plan, plans.plan_type FROM portfolios xp, xbss_realm_plyr_plan plans LEFT JOIN xbss_rl_region_plan1 regions ON regions.realm_plyr_plan_id = plans.id WHERE plans.realm_year_id = :realm_plan_year_id AND plans.portfolio_id = xp.portfolio_id AND plans.plan_type = xp.plan_type AND plans.benefit_plan NOT IN ( :out_of_region_plans ) AND ( plans.situs = 'TX' OR plans.situs IS NULL OR 1 = :returnAllSitus ) AND ( regions.region = :wse_state OR regions.region IS NULL ) AND plans.plan_type IN ( :plan_types ) AND ( plans.is_bundle_exclusive IS NULL OR plans.is_bundle_exclusive = 0 ) ) SELECT DISTINCT ap.plan_type, ap.benefit_plan, bp.descr FROM xbss_benef_plan_mv bp, applicable_plans ap WHERE ap.benefit_plan = bp.benefit_plan AND bp.effdt = ( SELECT MAX(bp2.effdt) FROM xbss_benef_plan_mv bp2 WHERE bp2.plan_type = bp.plan_type AND bp2.benefit_plan = bp.benefit_plan AND bp2.effdt <= :realm_plan_year_effdt )

SELECT DISTINCT SGPS.PLAN_TYPE, SGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_COMPANY C, XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG WHERE C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID AND C.CODE = :companyCode AND C.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND S.SUBMITTED = 1 AND S.ID = SGPS.STRATEGY_ID AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' AND SGPS.PLAN_TYPE IN ('10', '11', '14') AND SGPS.PLAN_TYPE IN (:planTypes) UNION SELECT DISTINCT ER_EE_MAP.EMPLOYER_PAID_PLAN_TYPE, ER_EE_MAP.EMPLOYER_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_COMPANY C, XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP SG, XBSS_ER_EE_PLANS_MAPPING ER_EE_MAP WHERE C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID AND C.CODE = :companyCode AND C.REALM_YEAR_ID = :realmPlanYearId AND S.SUBMITTED = 1 AND S.ID = SGPS.STRATEGY_ID AND S.ID = SG.STRATEGY_ID AND SGPS.BENEFIT_PLAN = ER_EE_MAP.EMPLOYEE_PAID_BENEFIT_PLAN AND C.REALM_YEAR_ID = ER_EE_MAP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND SG.STATUS = 'A' AND SGPS.PLAN_TYPE IN ('1D', '1V') AND ER_EE_MAP.EMPLOYER_PAID_PLAN_TYPE IN (:planTypes)

SELECT DECODE(SGPS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 'medical', '11', 'dental', '1D', 'dental', '14', 'vision', '1V', 'vision', SGPS.PLAN_TYPE), SUM(CONTRIB.BN_EMPL_RATE * CONTRIB.HEADCOUNT), SUM(CONTRIB.BN_EMPLR_RATE * CONTRIB.HEADCOUNT) FROM XBSS_COMPANY C, XBSS_GROUP G, XBSS_STRATEGY S, XBSS_STRATEGY_GROUP_PLANSELECT SGPS, XBSS_CONTRIBUTION CONTRIB WHERE C.ID = G.COMPANY_ID AND C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID AND G.ID = SGPS.GROUP_ID AND S.ID = SGPS.STRATEGY_ID AND SGPS.ID = CONTRIB.PLAN_SELECTION_ID AND C.ID = S.COMPANY_ID AND S.ID = :strategyId GROUP BY DECODE(SGPS.PLAN_TYPE, '10', 'medical', '11', 'dental', '1D', 'dental', '14', 'vision', '1V', 'vision', SGPS.PLAN_TYPE)

SELECT DECODE(SE.PLAN_TYPE, '23', 'LIFE', '30', 'DISABILITY', '31', 'DISABILITY', SE.PLAN_TYPE), SUM(SE.ESTIMATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE SE WHERE SE.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND SE.PLAN_TYPE IN ('23', '30', '31') GROUP BY DECODE(SE.PLAN_TYPE, '23', 'LIFE', '30', 'DISABILITY', '31', 'DISABILITY', SE.PLAN_TYPE)
SELECT SE.PLAN_TYPE, SUM(SE.ESTIMATE) FROM XBSS_STRATEGY_ESTIMATE SE WHERE SE.STRATEGY_ID = :strategyId AND SE.GROUP_ID = :groupId GROUP BY SE.PLAN_TYPE

SELECT PYP.PLAN_TYPE, PYP.PORTFOLIO_ID, PYP.BENEFIT_PLAN FROM XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR RPY, XBSS_REALM_PLYR_PLAN PYP LEFT OUTER JOIN XBSS_RL_REGION_PLAN1 RP ON PYP.ID = RP.REALM_PLYR_PLAN_ID, XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BP, XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO P WHERE RPY.ID = :realmPlanYearId AND RPY.ID = PYP.REALM_YEAR_ID AND (RP.REGION = :state OR RP.REGION IS NULL) AND PYP.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND PYP.PLAN_TYPE IN (:primaryPlanTypes) AND BP.EFFDT = ( SELECT MAX(BP2.EFFDT) FROM XBSS_BENEF_PLAN_MV BP2 WHERE BP2.PLAN_TYPE = BP.PLAN_TYPE AND BP2.BENEFIT_PLAN = BP.BENEFIT_PLAN AND BP2.EFFDT <= RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START ) AND PYP.BENEFIT_PLAN NOT IN (:outOfRegionPlans) AND (BP.DESCR NOT LIKE '% NTL' OR BP.DESCR LIKE '% Indemnity % NTL') AND BP.DESCR NOT LIKE '%US Territories' AND P.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN P.EFFDT AND P.ENDDT AND P.PLAN_TYPE = PYP.PLAN_TYPE AND P.PORTFOLIO_ID = PYP.PORTFOLIO_ID AND ( P.HQ_REGION = :state OR ( P.HQ_REGION = 'OT' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM XBSS_RL_PORTFOLIO P2 WHERE P2.OE_QUARTER = RPY.OE_QUARTER AND RPY.PLAN_YEAR_START BETWEEN P2.EFFDT AND P2.ENDDT AND P2.HQ_REGION = :state ) ) ) AND (PYP.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE IS NULL OR PYP.IS_BUNDLE_EXCLUSIVE = 0)

SELECT XC.CODE, XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_START, XRCP.CLONE_BENPGM, XC.BUNDLE_SEQ, XRPY.OE_QUARTER, XC.NAICS_CODE, XC.LARGE_DEAL_PROSPECT, XBQ.BUNDLE_ID, XR.BEN_EXCHNG FROM XBSS_COMPANY XC JOIN XBSS_REALM_PLAN_YEAR XRPY ON XRPY.ID = XC.REALM_YEAR_ID JOIN XBSS_REALM XR ON XRPY.REALM_ID = XR.ID JOIN XBSS_REALM_CLONE_PGM XRCP ON XRCP.OE_QUARTER = XRPY.OE_QUARTER AND XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XRCP.EFFDT AND XRCP.ENDDT LEFT JOIN XBSS_NAICS_BUNDLE XNB ON XNB.NAICS_CODE = XC.NAICS_CODE AND XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XNB.EFFDT AND XNB.ENDDT LEFT JOIN XBSS_BUNDLE_QUARTER XBQ ON XNB.BUNDLE_QUARTER_ID = XBQ.ID AND XBQ.OE_QUARTER = XRPY.OE_QUARTER AND XRPY.PLAN_YEAR_END BETWEEN XBQ.EFFDT AND XBQ.ENDDT WHERE XC.ID = :companyId
